ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.description: Ankle-length dress cut at waist with 6-panel bustier whalebone bodice in black & white horizontal pinstripe cady and superslim 4-panel skirt in vertical stripe cady. Medium high slit on left. Silk taffeta ribbon belt with decorative topstitching. Long slender white silk gazar stole with white silk organza lining, softly embracing arms and shoulders.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.exhibitions:
“Ferré. Abito come accento che esce dal corpo”, area Bernardelli, Mantova, 2015
“Gianfranco Ferré Designs”, Phoenix Art Museum, 2015
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.materials: Black&white chalkstripe print silk cady (Taroni, Como; art. 6422, des. 25, col. 1), silk gazar (Taroni, Como; art. 17028, col. 3020), silk taffeta, silk organza
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.remark: The sense of illusion is clear: what appears to be an exquisitely simple strapless one-sleeve blouse is actually a stole referencing both Indian sari and Japanese origami. Accentuating the severity elegance further is the use of mannish chalkstripes – ever a Ferré favorite – to create a singular graphic effect essential to the designer’s rethinking of feminine chic. Another must in the Ferré fashion lexicon is the wide ribbon style belt with decorative topstitching and magnificent bow flourish.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.bibliography:
“Gianfranco Ferré. Lessons in Fashion”, Maria Luisa Frisa (edited by), Marsilio, Venezia, 2009; “Moda. Dalla nascita della
haute couture a oggi”, Sofia Gnoli, Carocci Editore, Roma, 2012.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.working_process: Parallel topstitching with 1 cm spacing for bow

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.description: Long dress with black velvet bodice and slim b&w chalkstripe silk cady skirt. Silk taffeta belt complete with decorative topstitching. Stole in chalkstripe cady with black organza on the underside. A stunning wrap construction with all the flair of a giant ribbon.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.exhibitions: “Italian Style since 1945”, Victoria and Albert Museum, London, 2015
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.materials: Black&white chalkstripe print silk cady (Taroni, Como; art. 6422, des. 25, col. 1), silk velvet (Redaelli velvet; art. Prestige super; col. black), silk taffeta, silk organza
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.remark: Bordering between sleek feminine severity and slinky sari type silhouette, this dress makes a strong impact on both graphic and chromatic levels. Another point of interest is the revisitation in evening version of a supremely mannish chalkstripe pattern.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.working_process: Parallel topstitching with 1 cm spacing for bow

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.description: Cape in macro tartan print silk serge. A-line cut, floor length (longer in back). Shawl collar, capacious sleeves. Fully reversible thanks to the doubling in rich dark marten fur. Skirt in macro tartan print silk serge. Slim line, floor length, side slit. Bustier in cotton piqué with allover topstitching for a stiffish feel. Short, (upper) hip skimming. Sash in black silk taffeta
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.materials: White&black yarn-dyed silk serge with red/blue/green/black macro tartan print (Stucchi, Como; art. 4695, 100% silk); dark brown marten fur, white 100% cotton piqué, pure silk taffeta (col. black)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.remark: The utter opulence of the cape – as in the voluminous shape complete with hint of a train, the luscious warmth of the magnificent marten lining and the glossy/matte texture of the silk serge fabric – comes close to sparking images of royal court pomp.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.working_process: Horizontal 1 cm parallel topstitching all over bodice and sash

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (scritta oro)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.acquisition: Spazio FGF c/o Open Care - Milano
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.description: Giacca in jersey ; monopetto; revers a uomo; spalle importanti di linea arrotondata. Vestibilità asciutta al punto vita, sottolineato da un taglio orizzontale;lunghezza ai fianchi; allacciatura a un bottone; tasche rettangolari applicate; cintura dello stesso tessuto, con profilo e fibbia ricoperti in faille di seta. Gonna in faille di seta e jersey di lana accoppiati e impunturati ; struttura a due teli,linea asciutta; lunghezza al ginocchio e cinturetta in vita. T-shirt in jersey di lana; girocollo bordato (cm 1) in faille di seta; maniche corte; lunghezza ai fianchi;punto vita sottolineato da un taglio orizzontale; chiusura con zip sul dorso. Stola in jersey e faille abbinati e impunturati; composta da un grande rettangolo i cui lati corti sono ripiegati verso il centro e fissati in modo da creare un passaggio per le braccia.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.materials: Faille di seta grigio (Clerici Tessuto, Como ; art.01404, col. 413); jersey melange grigio (Lanapon/Sisan, Milano ; art. 10718, col 120, 100% lana)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.remark: Interessante è l’equilibrio tra gli stilemi della utility “fashion” degli anni ‘40 e i canoni degli ‘80. L’essere un capo couture è dato dall’effetto di opulenza , evidenziato ai lati della silhouette e sul dietro, suggerito dalla stola.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.working_process: Impunture orizzontali, parallele a 1 cm, a copertura totale sui due tessuti - jersey e seta - abbinati.

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.description: Coat in gray/black zigzag wool. Knee-length kimono style cut with hood, capacious sleeves, slanted besom pockets (4 cm). Wool/silk edging on hood and front. Tunic in white silk georgette. Straight 7/8 cut with wide round neck, short sleeves. White jet beading all over. Skirt in wool/silk satin with gorgeous sheen. Tubular style, knee length.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.materials: Zigzag pattern wool (Distel, Paris; art. 960, col. 561; 100% wool), wool/silk satin (Taroni, Como; art. 17055, col. black; 66% wool, 27% silk, 7% nylon), silk georgette (Clerici Tessuto, Como), crystal jet
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.remark: The winning element here is the very Ferré masculine/feminine material mix where delicate tone-on-tone beading (tunic) contrasts playfully with a zigzag pattern (coat).
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.working_process: Allover hand embroidery with small jet beading

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.description: Caban in dove gray silk organza with cornely embroidery. 7/8 length, kimono sleeves, no collar. T-shirt in dove gray silk chiffon with cornely embroidery. Hip skimming. Skirt in gray wool grisaille fabric. Straight knee-length cut. Sash in gray silk faille with 1 cm parallel topstitching.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.materials: Silk organza, wool grisaille (Loro Piana, Quarona Sesia), silk faille, silk chiffon; viscose ribbon
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.remark: The elementary geo shapes of jacket and T-shirt find a perfect sense of counterpoint in the gorgeous material with rich embroidery and glossy/matte texture.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.working_process: Serpentine & spiral cornely embroidery with viscose ribbon (Ricamificio Damiani)

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.description: Top in black velvet with allover topstitching. Sleeveless, (upper) hip skimming. Round neck in front, total rectangular low cut in back. Belt in black velvet with soft nappa leather covered buckle. Skirt in macro tartan print silk with all the impression of a two-part construction: underneath, a floor-length body-hugging skirt with deep front slit; on top, a richly and softly pleated panel cinched by the belt with openings front & back. Stole in rectangular cut, with one corner of the short end folded toward center and fixed in place to form a funnel style sleeve.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.materials: Silk velvet (Redaelli velvets, art. Yvonne super, col. black), white&black yarn-dyed silk serge with red/blue/green/black macro tartan print (Stucchi, Como; art. 4695, 100% silk), silk faille (Taroni, Como; art. 1319, col. black)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.remark: The architect of fashion’s DNA comes through both in the way he finesses the fabric to create the precise volume of the skirt and in the way he designs the stole to attain an emphatic geometric shape – which ultimately embraces the figure with elegance and grace.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.working_process: Horizontal 1 cm parallel topstitching all over the velvet top

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.description: Top short and snug, (upper) hip skimming in length. Halter neck, crisscross ribbon straps down to waist in back. Allover topstitching. Stole in rectangular cut, with one corner of the short end folded toward center and fixed in place to form a funnel style sleeve. Belt in black velvet with soft nappa leather covered buckle. Skirt in macro tartan print silk with all the impression of a two-part construction: underneath, a floor-length body-hugging skirt with deep front slit; on top, a richly and softly pleated panel cinched by the belt with openings front & back.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.materials: Silk velvet (Redaelli velvets, art. Yvonne super, col. black), white&black yarn-dyed silk serge with red/blue/green/black macro tartan print (Stucchi, Como; art. 4695, 100% silk), silk faille (Taroni, Como; art. 1319, col. black)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.remark: Here too the architect of fashion’s DNA emerges equally in the way he finesses the fabric to create the precise volume of the skirt and in the way he designs the stole to attain an emphatic geometric shape – which ultimately embraces the figure with elegance and grace.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.working_process: Horizonal 1 cm parallel topstitching all over the velvet top and the stole

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.description: Long dress with black velvet bodice and slim b&w chalkstripe silk cady skirt. Silk taffeta belt complete with decorative topstitching. Stole in chalkstripe cady with black organza on the underside. A stunning wrap construction with all the flair of a giant ribbon.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.exhibitions: “Italian Style since 1945”, Victoria and Albert Museum, London, 2015

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan

Another point of interest is the revisitation in evening version of a supremely mannish chalkstripe pattern.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_drawing.working_process: Parallel topstitching with 1 cm spacing for bow

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.materials: Cashmere knit (Maglificio di Vignola, Vignola), silk georgette, silk print fabric (Sisan, Como; art. 219; des. 941, var. 6)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.description: Tunic in cashmere knit fabric with stitched silk georgette doubling. High neck, long wide tubular sleeves, linear 7/8 cut with metal button fastening on left shoulder. Skirt in two-layer georgette. Ankle length, hip-hugging basque, skinny waistband.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.remark: What makes the outfit distinctive is the opposition between top and bottom, namely between the geometric tunic with a quiet oriental flair and the billowy light skirt with soft pleating.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.working_process: Horizontal parallel topstitching with 1 cm spacing; flat pleating in various depths

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.materials: Silk organza, wool grisaille (Loro Piana, Quarona Sesia), silk faille, silk chiffon; viscose ribbon
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.description: Caban in dove gray silk organza with cornely embroidery. 7/8 length, kimono sleeves, no collar. T-shirt in dove gray silk chiffon with cornely embroidery. Hip skimming. Skirt in gray wool grisaille fabric. Straight knee-length cut. Sash in gray silk faille with 1 cm parallel topstitching.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.remark: The elementary geo shapes of jacket and T-shirt find a perfect sense of counterpoint in the gorgeous material with rich embroidery and glossy/matte texture.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.working_process: Serpentine & spiral cornely embroidery with viscose ribbon (Ricamificio Damiani)

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.garments: jacket, skirt, scarf, coat, gloves, heels

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.materials: Silk gazaar (Taroni, Como; art. 2829 100% silk; col. black), wool/silk blend fabric (Taroni, Como; art. 17055 66% wool, 27% silk 7% nylon; col. black)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.description: Jacket in black silk gazar. Hip-skimming circular cut with high gloss wool/silk edging. Dress in black silk gazaar with long sleeves and low-cut V neckline. Knee length. Lavish trumpet effect in front thanks to a semi-circular panel with matching cinch belt at waist.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.remark: This outfit offers a glimpse of Ferré’s architectural training. Essential to giving extra volume to the jacket is the basic geometric design, as what creates the effect of (in reality non-existent) sleeves is the round piece of fabric folded over and kept in place by artful stitching. Another geometric shape – the semi circle – adds volume to the front of the dress through the use of a belt.

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.materials: sequin, leather
wool
Silk georgette (Taroni, Como), wool/silk satin (Taroni, Como; art. 17055, col. black), strass and jets in gray, white and anthracite tones
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.description: Tunica in georgette di seta grigia completamente ricamata; profondo scollo a V; manica lunga a tubo; linea a stringere al fondo; lunghezza 7/8 . Gonna in lana-seta nera; linea asciutta; lunghezza al ginocchio.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.remark: What’s remarkable here is how an item reminiscent of a maxi pullover, semi homewear mode, can go totally glam thanks to beading creating the illusion of a shimmering tweed fabric.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.working_process: Allover hand beading with tweedy effect

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.materials: fur, wool
sequins
Black breitschwanz fur, silk georgette (Clerici Tessuto, Como; art. 01031, col. black), silk satin
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.description: T-shirt in black breitschwanz with white silk satin collar and black silk satin bow. Skirt in two-layer black silk georgette with hip-hugging basque. Soft flat pleating, deep front slit. Ankle length.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.remark: The unusual use of fur, lusciously soft thanks to a special treatment, takes the concept of ultra simple tee to the next level. Equally interesting is the contrast between superlight georgette fabric and thick rich breitschwanz fur.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.working_process: Fine flat pleating with even 3 cm spacing

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.notes: white long sleeve dress with black detail

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.materials: Silk faille (Taroni, Como; art. 1319, col. 908), ivory color beaver fur
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.description: Cape in ivory silk faille. 7/8 circle cut, capacious sleeves, no collar. Ivory beaver fur lining. Long dress in ivory silk faille. Slim line with two trumpet cut panels in front draping fluidly from shoulder and upper side seams. A wide belt in matching fabric holds the panels softly in place at waist yet only in front.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.remark: The cape and evening gown are reminiscent of 1950s designs for opening nights at La Scala Opera House in Milan. The sumptuous style is there in the shapes, volumes and proportions. As evident in back, the dress is for the most part slim fit. The ballgown allure comes from the gorgeous material and, best of all, from the two rich paremontures (facings) gently embracing shoulders.

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.materials: Silk faille (Taroni, Como; art. 1319, col. black & col. 908), ivory color beaver fur
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.description: Jacket in boxy shape. Wide sleeves, no collar or closure. Ivory beaver fur lining. Shirt in ivory silk faille. Ample line narrowing gently toward bottom. Long sleeves. Collar and wide lapels held firmly in place at waist, no fastening. Skirt in black silk faille. Long and lavish with double construction: underneath, skinny skirt with three-button front fastening; on top, fully circular one totally open in front.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.remark: This fabulous evening outfit sparks images of emphatic 1950s femininity. Complete with new and interesting tweaks, as in the boxy jacket versus the ballgown skirt.

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.materials: Silk faille (Taroni, Como; art. 1319, col. black, 100% silk)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.description: Long dress in black silk faille with trompe-l’oeil construction, namely mimicking a slimline shirtwaist worn backwards. Circular panels starting at shoulders and passing firmly under the cinch belt create an overskirt effect open in front.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.remark: This design offers Gianfranco Ferré the opportunity to enjoy one of his favorite pastimes: playing an other-way-around game. Simply by switching front and back, the designer succeeds in turning a classic shirtwaist into a gorgeous ballgown. He conducts innovative and thoughtful research on clothing construction, then works his special magic by adding the two panels that give an appearance of volume to the skirt.

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.materials: fur
White&black yarn-dyed silk serge with red/blue/green/black macro tartan print (Stucchi, Como; art. 4695, 100% silk); white 100% cotton piqué, pure silk taffeta (col. black)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.description: Cape in macro tartan print silk serge with full doubling in same fabric. A-line cut, floor length. Shawl collar, capacious sleeves. Skirt in macro tartan print silk serge. Slim line, floor length, front slit. A herringbone effect in front thanks to the two-section bias cut. Back on the grain in sync with the tartan pattern. Bustier in cotton piqué with allover topstitching for a stifffish feel. Short, hip skimming style. Sash in black silk taffeta.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.remark: Capturing the imagination here is the opulent tartan print. The use of this pattern on the bias for the front part of the skirt adds a strong element of graphic contrast to the whole.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.working_process: Horizontal 1 cm parallel topstitching all over bodice and sash

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.materials: White&black yarn-dyed silk serge with red/blue/green/black macro tartan print (Stucchi, Como; art. 4695, 100% silk); dark brown marten fur, white 100% cotton piqué, pure silk taffeta (col. black)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.description: Cape in macro tartan print silk serge. A-line cut, floor length (longer in back). Shawl collar, capacious sleeves. Fully reversible thanks to the doubling in rich dark marten fur. Skirt in macro tartan print silk serge. Slim line, floor length, side slit. Bustier in cotton piqué with allover topstitching for a stiffish feel. Short, (upper) hip skimming. Sash in black silk taffeta
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.remark: The utter opulence of the cape – as in the voluminous shape complete with hint of a train, the luscious warmth of the magnificent marten lining and the glossy/matte texture of the silk serge fabric – comes close to sparking images of royal court pomp.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.working_process: Horizontal 1 cm parallel topstitching all over bodice and sash

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.materials: Silk velvet (Redaelli velvets, art. Yvonne super, col. black), white&black yarn-dyed silk serge with red/blue/green/black macro tartan print (Stucchi, Como; art. 4695, 100% silk), silk faille (Taroni, Como; art. 1319, col. black)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.description: Top in black velvet with allover topstitching. Sleeveless, (upper) hip skimming. Round neck in front, total rectangular low cut in back. Belt in black velvet with soft nappa leather covered buckle. Skirt in macro tartan print silk with all the impression of a two-part construction: underneath, a floor-length body-hugging skirt with deep front slit; on top, a richly and softly pleated panel cinched by the belt with openings front & back. Stole in rectangular cut, with one corner of the short end folded toward center and fixed in place to form a funnel style sleeve.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.remark: The architect of fashion’s DNA comes through both in the way he finesses the fabric to create the precise volume of the skirt and in the way he designs the stole to attain an emphatic geometric shape – which ultimately embraces the figure with elegance and grace.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.working_process: Horizontal 1 cm parallel topstitching all over the velvet top

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.materials: Silk velvet (Redaelli velvets, art. Yvonne super, col. black), white&black yarn-dyed silk serge with red/blue/green/black macro tartan print (Stucchi, Como; art. 4695, 100% silk), silk faille (Taroni, Como; art. 1319, col. black)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.description: Top short and snug, (upper) hip skimming in length. Halter neck, crisscross ribbon straps down to waist in back. Allover topstitching. Stole in rectangular cut, with one corner of the short end folded toward center and fixed in place to form a funnel style sleeve. Belt in black velvet with soft nappa leather covered buckle. Skirt in macro tartan print silk with all the impression of a two-part construction: underneath, a floor-length body-hugging skirt with deep front slit; on top, a richly and softly pleated panel cinched by the belt with openings front & back.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.remark: Here too the architect of fashion’s DNA emerges equally in the way he finesses the fabric to create the precise volume of the skirt and in the way he designs the stole to attain an emphatic geometric shape – which ultimately embraces the figure with elegance and grace.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.working_process: Horizonal 1 cm parallel topstitching all over the velvet top and the stole

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.materials: Faille di seta grigio (Clerici Tessuto, Como ; art.01404, col. 413); jersey melange grigio (Lanapon/Sisan, Milano ; art. 10718, col 120, 100% lana)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (scritta oro)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.acquisition: Spazio FGF c/o Open Care - Milano
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.description: Giacca in jersey ; monopetto; revers a uomo; spalle importanti di linea arrotondata. Vestibilità asciutta al punto vita, sottolineato da un taglio orizzontale;lunghezza ai fianchi; allacciatura a un bottone; tasche rettangolari applicate; cintura dello stesso tessuto, con profilo e fibbia ricoperti in faille di seta. Gonna in faille di seta e jersey di lana accoppiati e impunturati ; struttura a due teli,linea asciutta; lunghezza al ginocchio e cinturetta in vita. T-shirt in jersey di lana; girocollo bordato (cm 1) in faille di seta; maniche corte; lunghezza ai fianchi;punto vita sottolineato da un taglio orizzontale; chiusura con zip sul dorso. Stola in jersey e faille abbinati e impunturati; composta da un grande rettangolo i cui lati corti sono ripiegati verso il centro e fissati in modo da creare un passaggio per le braccia.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.remark: Interessante è l’equilibrio tra gli stilemi della utility “fashion” degli anni ‘40 e i canoni degli ‘80. L’essere un capo couture è dato dall’effetto di opulenza , evidenziato ai lati della silhouette e sul dietro, suggerito dalla stola.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.working_process: Impunture orizzontali, parallele a 1 cm, a copertura totale sui due tessuti - jersey e seta - abbinati.

fur, sequins

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.description: Caban in dove gray silk organza with cornely embroidery. 7/8 length, kimono sleeves, no collar. T-shirt in dove gray silk chiffon with cornely embroidery. Hip skimming. Skirt in gray wool grisaille fabric. Straight knee-length cut. Sash in gray silk faille with 1 cm parallel topstitching.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.remark: The elementary geo shapes of jacket and T-shirt find a perfect sense of counterpoint in the gorgeous material with rich embroidery and glossy/matte texture.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.working_process: Serpentine & spiral cornely embroidery with viscose ribbon (Ricamificio Damiani)

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.description: Tunica in georgette di seta grigia completamente ricamata; profondo scollo a V; manica lunga a tubo; linea a stringere al fondo; lunghezza 7/8 . Gonna in lana-seta nera; linea asciutta; lunghezza al ginocchio.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.remark: What’s remarkable here is how an item reminiscent of a maxi pullover, semi homewear mode, can go totally glam thanks to beading creating the illusion of a shimmering tweed fabric.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.working_process: Allover hand beading with tweedy effect

fur, wool, leather
fur

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.notes: shoulder pads, back cut-out, geometric cuff

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.materials: sequin, leather
Black&white chalkstripe print silk cady (Taroni, Como; art. 6422, des. 25, col. 1), silk velvet (Redaelli velvet; art. Prestige super; col. black), silk taffeta, silk organza
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.description: Long dress with black velvet bodice and slim b&w chalkstripe silk cady skirt. Silk taffeta belt complete with decorative topstitching. Stole in chalkstripe cady with black organza on the underside. A stunning wrap construction with all the flair of a giant ribbon.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.exhibitions: “Italian Style since 1945”, Victoria and Albert Museum, London, 2015
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.remark: Bordering between sleek feminine severity and slinky sari type silhouette, this dress makes a strong impact on both graphic and chromatic levels. Another point of interest is the revisitation in evening version of a supremely mannish chalkstripe pattern.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.working_process: Parallel topstitching with 1 cm spacing for bow

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.materials: Black&white chalkstripe print silk cady (Taroni, Como; art. 6422, des. 25, col. 1), silk velvet (Redaelli velvet; art. Prestige super; col. black), silk taffeta, silk organza
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.description: Long dress with black velvet bodice and slim b&w chalkstripe silk cady skirt. Silk taffeta belt complete with decorative topstitching. Stole in chalkstripe cady with black organza on the underside. A stunning wrap construction with all the flair of a giant ribbon.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.exhibitions: “Italian Style since 1945”, Victoria and Albert Museum, London, 2015
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.remark: Bordering between sleek feminine severity and slinky sari type silhouette, this dress makes a strong impact on both graphic and chromatic levels. Another point of interest is the revisitation in evening version of a supremely mannish chalkstripe pattern.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.working_process: Parallel topstitching with 1 cm spacing for bow

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.materials: Black&white chalkstripe print silk cady (Taroni, Como; art. 6422, des. 25, col. 1), silk gazar (Taroni, Como; art. 17028, col. 3020), silk taffeta, silk organza
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.description: Ankle-length dress cut at waist with 6-panel bustier whalebone bodice in black & white horizontal pinstripe cady and superslim 4-panel skirt in vertical stripe cady. Medium high slit on left. Silk taffeta ribbon belt with decorative topstitching. Long slender white silk gazar stole with white silk organza lining, softly embracing arms and shoulders.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.exhibitions:
“Ferré. Abito come accento che esce dal corpo”, area Bernardelli, Mantova, 2015
“Gianfranco Ferré Designs”, Phoenix Art Museum, 2015
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.remark: The sense of illusion is clear: what appears to be an exquisitely simple strapless one-sleeve blouse is actually a stole referencing both Indian sari and Japanese origami. Accentuating the severity elegance further is the use of mannish chalkstripes – ever a Ferré favorite – to create a singular graphic effect essential to the designer’s rethinking of feminine chic. Another must in the Ferré fashion lexicon is the wide ribbon style belt with decorative topstitching and magnificent bow flourish.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.bibliography:
“Gianfranco Ferré. Lessons in Fashion”, Maria Luisa Frisa (edited by), Marsilio, Venezia, 2009; “Moda. Dalla nascita della
haute couture a oggi”, Sofia Gnoli, Carocci Editore, Roma, 2012.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.working_process: Parallel topstitching with 1 cm spacing for bow

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.materials: Silk faille (Taroni, Como; art. 1319, col. 908), ivory color beaver fur
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.description: Cape in ivory silk faille. 7/8 circle cut, capacious sleeves, no collar. Ivory beaver fur lining. Long dress in ivory silk faille. Slim line with two trumpet cut panels in front draping fluidly from shoulder and upper side seams. A wide belt in matching fabric holds the panels softly in place at waist yet only in front.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.remark: The cape and evening gown are reminiscent of 1950s designs for opening nights at La Scala Opera House in Milan. The sumptuous style is there in the shapes, volumes and proportions. As evident in back, the dress is for the most part slim fit. The ballgown allure comes from the gorgeous material and, best of all, from the two rich paremontures (facings) gently embracing shoulders.

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.notes: belted robe over top and skirt

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.description: Cape in macro tartan print silk serge with full doubling in same fabric. A-line cut, floor length. Shawl collar, capacious sleeves. Skirt in macro tartan print silk serge. Slim line, floor length, front slit. A herringbone effect in front thanks to the two-section bias cut. Back on the grain in sync with the tartan pattern. Bustier in cotton piqué with allover topstitching for a stifffish feel. Short, hip skimming style. Sash in black silk taffeta.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.remark: Capturing the imagination here is the opulent tartan print. The use of this pattern on the bias for the front part of the skirt adds a strong element of graphic contrast to the whole.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.working_process: Horizontal 1 cm parallel topstitching all over bodice and sash

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.materials: organza
satin

sequin
fur
Black&white chalkstripe print silk cady (Taroni, Como; art. 6422, des. 25, col. 1), silk velvet (Redaelli velvet; art. Prestige super; col. black), silk taffeta, silk organza
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.description: Long dress with black velvet bodice and slim b&w chalkstripe silk cady skirt. Silk taffeta belt complete with decorative topstitching. Stole in chalkstripe cady with black organza on the underside. A stunning wrap construction with all the flair of a giant ribbon.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.exhibitions: “Italian Style since 1945”, Victoria and Albert Museum, London, 2015
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.remark: Bordering between sleek feminine severity and slinky sari type silhouette, this dress makes a strong impact on both graphic and chromatic levels. Another point of interest is the revisitation in evening version of a supremely mannish chalkstripe pattern.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.working_process: Parallel topstitching with 1 cm spacing for bow

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.materials: velvet
Silk faille (Taroni, Como; art. 1319, col. black, 100% silk)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.description: Long dress in black silk faille with trompe-l’oeil construction, namely mimicking a slimline shirtwaist worn backwards. Circular panels starting at shoulders and passing firmly under the cinch belt create an overskirt effect open in front.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.remark: This design offers Gianfranco Ferré the opportunity to enjoy one of his favorite pastimes: playing an other-way-around game. Simply by switching front and back, the designer succeeds in turning a classic shirtwaist into a gorgeous ballgown. He conducts innovative and thoughtful research on clothing construction, then works his special magic by adding the two panels that give an appearance of volume to the skirt.

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.materials: fur
fur

Silk velvet (Redaelli velvets, art. Yvonne super, col. black), white&black yarn-dyed silk serge with red/blue/green/black macro tartan print (Stucchi, Como; art. 4695, 100% silk), silk faille (Taroni, Como; art. 1319, col. black)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.description: Top in black velvet with allover topstitching. Sleeveless, (upper) hip skimming. Round neck in front, total rectangular low cut in back. Belt in black velvet with soft nappa leather covered buckle. Skirt in macro tartan print silk with all the impression of a two-part construction: underneath, a floor-length body-hugging skirt with deep front slit; on top, a richly and softly pleated panel cinched by the belt with openings front & back. Stole in rectangular cut, with one corner of the short end folded toward center and fixed in place to form a funnel style sleeve.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.remark: The architect of fashion’s DNA comes through both in the way he finesses the fabric to create the precise volume of the skirt and in the way he designs the stole to attain an emphatic geometric shape – which ultimately embraces the figure with elegance and grace.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.working_process: Horizontal 1 cm parallel topstitching all over the velvet top

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.materials: fur
Black&white chalkstripe print silk cady (Taroni, Como; art. 6422, des. 25, col. 1), silk gazar (Taroni, Como; art. 17028, col. 3020), silk taffeta, silk organza
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.description: Ankle-length dress cut at waist with 6-panel bustier whalebone bodice in black & white horizontal pinstripe cady and superslim 4-panel skirt in vertical stripe cady. Medium high slit on left. Silk taffeta ribbon belt with decorative topstitching. Long slender white silk gazar stole with white silk organza lining, softly embracing arms and shoulders.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.exhibitions:
“Ferré. Abito come accento che esce dal corpo”, area Bernardelli, Mantova, 2015
“Gianfranco Ferré Designs”, Phoenix Art Museum, 2015
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.remark: The sense of illusion is clear: what appears to be an exquisitely simple strapless one-sleeve blouse is actually a stole referencing both Indian sari and Japanese origami. Accentuating the severity elegance further is the use of mannish chalkstripes – ever a Ferré favorite – to create a singular graphic effect essential to the designer’s rethinking of feminine chic. Another must in the Ferré fashion lexicon is the wide ribbon style belt with decorative topstitching and magnificent bow flourish.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.bibliography:
“Gianfranco Ferré. Lessons in Fashion”, Maria Luisa Frisa (edited by), Marsilio, Venezia, 2009; “Moda. Dalla nascita della
haute couture a oggi”, Sofia Gnoli, Carocci Editore, Roma, 2012.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.working_process: Parallel topstitching with 1 cm spacing for bow

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.materials: silk
Faille di seta grigio (Clerici Tessuto, Como ; art.01404, col. 413); jersey melange grigio (Lanapon/Sisan, Milano ; art. 10718, col 120, 100% lana)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (scritta oro)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.acquisition: Spazio FGF c/o Open Care - Milano
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.description: Giacca in jersey ; monopetto; revers a uomo; spalle importanti di linea arrotondata. Vestibilità asciutta al punto vita, sottolineato da un taglio orizzontale;lunghezza ai fianchi; allacciatura a un bottone; tasche rettangolari applicate; cintura dello stesso tessuto, con profilo e fibbia ricoperti in faille di seta. Gonna in faille di seta e jersey di lana accoppiati e impunturati ; struttura a due teli,linea asciutta; lunghezza al ginocchio e cinturetta in vita. T-shirt in jersey di lana; girocollo bordato (cm 1) in faille di seta; maniche corte; lunghezza ai fianchi;punto vita sottolineato da un taglio orizzontale; chiusura con zip sul dorso. Stola in jersey e faille abbinati e impunturati; composta da un grande rettangolo i cui lati corti sono ripiegati verso il centro e fissati in modo da creare un passaggio per le braccia.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.remark: Interessante è l’equilibrio tra gli stilemi della utility “fashion” degli anni ‘40 e i canoni degli ‘80. L’essere un capo couture è dato dall’effetto di opulenza , evidenziato ai lati della silhouette e sul dietro, suggerito dalla stola.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.working_process: Impunture orizzontali, parallele a 1 cm, a copertura totale sui due tessuti - jersey e seta - abbinati.

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.materials: Cashmere knit (Maglificio di Vignola, Vignola), silk georgette, silk print fabric (Sisan, Como; art. 219; des. 941, var. 6)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.description: Tunic in cashmere knit fabric with stitched silk georgette doubling. High neck, long wide tubular sleeves, linear 7/8 cut with metal button fastening on left shoulder. Skirt in two-layer georgette. Ankle length, hip-hugging basque, skinny waistband.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.remark: What makes the outfit distinctive is the opposition between top and bottom, namely between the geometric tunic with a quiet oriental flair and the billowy light skirt with soft pleating.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.working_process: Horizontal parallel topstitching with 1 cm spacing; flat pleating in various depths

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.materials: Silk velvet (Redaelli velvets, art. Yvonne super, col. black), white&black yarn-dyed silk serge with red/blue/green/black macro tartan print (Stucchi, Como; art. 4695, 100% silk), silk faille (Taroni, Como; art. 1319, col. black)

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.materials: silk
Silk gazaar (Taroni, Como; art. 2829 100% silk; col. black), wool/silk blend fabric (Taroni, Como; art. 17055 66% wool, 27% silk 7% nylon; col. black)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.description: Jacket in black silk gazar. Hip-skimming circular cut with high gloss wool/silk edging. Dress in black silk gazaar with long sleeves and low-cut V neckline. Knee length. Lavish trumpet effect in front thanks to a semi-circular panel with matching cinch belt at waist.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.remark: This outfit offers a glimpse of Ferré’s architectural training. Essential to giving extra volume to the jacket is the basic geometric design, as what creates the effect of (in reality non-existent) sleeves is the round piece of fabric folded over and kept in place by artful stitching. Another geometric shape – the semi circle – adds volume to the front of the dress through the use of a belt.

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos/.materials: sequin

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.description: Coat in gray/black zigzag wool. Knee-length kimono style cut with hood, capacious sleeves, slanted besom pockets (4 cm). Wool/silk edging on hood and front. Tunic in white silk georgette. Straight 7/8 cut with wide round neck, short sleeves. White jet beading all over. Skirt in wool/silk satin with gorgeous sheen. Tubular style, knee length.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.materials: Zigzag pattern wool (Distel, Paris; art. 960, col. 561; 100% wool), wool/silk satin (Taroni, Como; art. 17055, col. black; 66% wool, 27% silk, 7% nylon), silk georgette (Clerici Tessuto, Como), crystal jet
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.remark: The winning element here is the very Ferré masculine/feminine material mix where delicate tone-on-tone beading (tunic) contrasts playfully with a zigzag pattern (coat).
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.working_process: Allover hand embroidery with small jet beading

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.remark: Bordering between sleek feminine severity and slinky sari type silhouette, this dress makes a strong impact on both graphic and chromatic levels. Another point of interest is the revisitation in evening version of a supremely mannish chalkstripe pattern.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.working_process: Parallel topstitching with 1 cm spacing for bow

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.description: Cape in ivory silk faille. 7/8 circle cut, capacious sleeves, no collar. Ivory beaver fur lining. Long dress in ivory silk faille. Slim line with two trumpet cut panels in front draping fluidly from shoulder and upper side seams. A wide belt in matching fabric holds the panels softly in place at waist yet only in front.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.materials: Silk faille (Taroni, Como; art. 1319, col. 908), ivory color beaver fur
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.remark: The cape and evening gown are reminiscent of 1950s designs for opening nights at La Scala Opera House in Milan. The sumptuous style is there in the shapes, volumes and proportions. As evident in back, the dress is for the most part slim fit. The ballgown allure comes from the gorgeous material and, best of all, from the two rich paremontures (facings) gently embracing shoulders.

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.description: Jacket in boxy shape. Wide sleeves, no collar or closure. Ivory beaver fur lining. Shirt in ivory silk faille. Ample line narrowing gently toward bottom. Long sleeves. Collar and wide lapels held firmly in place at waist, no fastening. Skirt in black silk faille. Long and lavish with double construction: underneath, skinny skirt with three-button front fastening; on top, fully circular one totally open in front.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.materials: Silk faille (Taroni, Como; art. 1319, col. black & col. 908), ivory color beaver fur
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.remark: This fabulous evening outfit sparks images of emphatic 1950s femininity. Complete with new and interesting tweaks, as in the boxy jacket versus the ballgown skirt.

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.description: Long dress in black silk faille with trompe-l’oeil construction, namely mimicking a slimline shirtwaist worn backwards. Circular panels starting at shoulders and passing firmly under the cinch belt create an overskirt effect open in front.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.materials: Silk faille (Taroni, Como; art. 1319, col. black, 100% silk)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.remark: This design offers Gianfranco Ferré the opportunity to enjoy one of his favorite pastimes: playing an other-way-around game. Simply by switching front and back, the designer succeeds in turning a classic shirtwaist into a gorgeous ballgown. He conducts innovative and thoughtful research on clothing construction, then works his special magic by adding the two panels that give an appearance of volume to the skirt.

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.description: Cape in macro tartan print silk serge. A-line cut, floor length (longer in back). Shawl collar, capacious sleeves. Fully reversible thanks to the doubling in rich dark marten fur. Skirt in macro tartan print silk serge. Slim line, floor length, side slit. Bustier in cotton piqué with allover topstitching for a stiffish feel. Short, (upper) hip skimming. Sash in black silk taffeta
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.materials: White&black yarn-dyed silk serge with red/blue/green/black macro tartan print (Stucchi, Como; art. 4695, 100% silk); dark brown marten fur, white 100% cotton piqué, pure silk taffeta (col. black)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.remark: The utter opulence of the cape – as in the voluminous shape complete with hint of a train, the luscious warmth of the magnificent marten lining and the glossy/matte texture of the silk serge fabric – comes close to sparking images of royal court pomp.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.working_process: Horizontal 1 cm parallel topstitching all over bodice and sash

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.description: Top in black velvet with allover topstitching. Sleeveless, (upper) hip skimming. Round neck in front, total rectangular low cut in back. Belt in black velvet with soft nappa leather covered buckle. Skirt in macro tartan print silk with all the impression of a two-part construction: underneath, a floor-length body-hugging skirt with deep front slit; on top, a richly and softly pleated panel cinched by the belt with openings front & back. Stole in rectangular cut, with one corner of the short end folded toward center and fixed in place to form a funnel style sleeve.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.materials: Silk velvet (Redaelli velvets, art. Yvonne super, col. black), white&black yarn-dyed silk serge with red/blue/green/black macro tartan print (Stucchi, Como; art. 4695, 100% silk), silk faille (Taroni, Como; art. 1319, col. black)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.remark: The architect of fashion’s DNA comes through both in the way he finesses the fabric to create the precise volume of the skirt and in the way he designs the stole to attain an emphatic geometric shape – which ultimately embraces the figure with elegance and grace.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.working_process: Horizontal 1 cm parallel topstitching all over the velvet top

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.description: Top short and snug, (upper) hip skimming in length. Halter neck, crisscross ribbon straps down to waist in back. Allover topstitching. Stole in rectangular cut, with one corner of the short end folded toward center and fixed in place to form a funnel style sleeve. Belt in black velvet with soft nappa leather covered buckle. Skirt in macro tartan print silk with all the impression of a two-part construction: underneath, a floor-length body-hugging skirt with deep front slit; on top, a richly and softly pleated panel cinched by the belt with openings front & back.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.materials: Silk velvet (Redaelli velvets, art. Yvonne super, col. black), white&black yarn-dyed silk serge with red/blue/green/black macro tartan print (Stucchi, Como; art. 4695, 100% silk), silk faille (Taroni, Como; art. 1319, col. black)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.remark: Here too the architect of fashion’s DNA emerges equally in the way he finesses the fabric to create the precise volume of the skirt and in the way he designs the stole to attain an emphatic geometric shape – which ultimately embraces the figure with elegance and grace.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.working_process: Horizonal 1 cm parallel topstitching all over the velvet top and the stole

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.description: Jacket in black silk gazar. Hip-skimming circular cut with high gloss wool/silk edging. Dress in black silk gazaar with long sleeves and low-cut V neckline. Knee length. Lavish trumpet effect in front thanks to a semi-circular panel with matching cinch belt at waist.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.materials: Silk gazaar (Taroni, Como; art. 2829 100% silk; col. black), wool/silk blend fabric (Taroni, Como; art. 17055 66% wool, 27% silk 7% nylon; col. black)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.remark: This outfit offers a glimpse of Ferré’s architectural training. Essential to giving extra volume to the jacket is the basic geometric design, as what creates the effect of (in reality non-existent) sleeves is the round piece of fabric folded over and kept in place by artful stitching. Another geometric shape – the semi circle – adds volume to the front of the dress through the use of a belt.

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.description: Jacket in black silk gazar. Hip-skimming circular cut with high gloss wool/silk edging. Dress in black silk gazaar with long sleeves and low-cut V neckline. Knee length. Lavish trumpet effect in front thanks to a semi-circular panel with matching cinch belt at waist.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.materials: Silk gazaar (Taroni, Como; art. 2829 100% silk; col. black), wool/silk blend fabric (Taroni, Como; art. 17055 66% wool, 27% silk 7% nylon; col. black)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan

Essential to giving extra volume to the jacket is the basic geometric design, as what creates the effect of (in reality non-existent) sleeves is the round piece of fabric folded over and kept in place by artful stitching. Another geometric shape – the semi circle – adds volume to the front of the dress through the use of a belt.

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.description: Tunica in georgette di seta grigia completamente ricamata; profondo scollo a V; manica lunga a tubo; linea a stringere al fondo; lunghezza 7/8 . Gonna in lana-seta nera; linea asciutta; lunghezza al ginocchio.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.materials: Silk georgette (Taroni, Como), wool/silk satin (Taroni, Como; art. 17055, col. black), strass and jets in gray, white and anthracite tones
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.remark: What’s remarkable here is how an item reminiscent of a maxi pullover, semi homewear mode, can go totally glam thanks to beading creating the illusion of a shimmering tweed fabric.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.working_process: Allover hand beading with tweedy effect

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.description: Tunica in georgette di seta grigia completamente ricamata; profondo scollo a V; manica lunga a tubo; linea a stringere al fondo; lunghezza 7/8 . Gonna in lana-seta nera; linea asciutta; lunghezza al ginocchio.

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.description: Long dress with black velvet bodice and slim b&w chalkstripe silk cady skirt. Silk taffeta belt complete with decorative topstitching. Stole in chalkstripe cady with black organza on the underside. A stunning wrap construction with all the flair of a giant ribbon.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.exhibitions: “Italian Style since 1945”, Victoria and Albert Museum, London, 2015
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.materials: Black&white chalkstripe print silk cady (Taroni, Como; art. 6422, des. 25, col. 1), silk velvet (Redaelli velvet; art. Prestige super; col. black), silk taffeta, silk organza

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.description: Tunic in cashmere knit fabric with stitched silk georgette doubling. High neck, long wide tubular sleeves, linear 7/8 cut with metal button fastening on left shoulder. Skirt in two-layer georgette. Ankle length, hip-hugging basque, skinny waistband.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.materials: Cashmere knit (Maglificio di Vignola, Vignola), silk georgette, silk print fabric (Sisan, Como; art. 219; des. 941, var. 6)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.remark: What makes the outfit distinctive is the opposition between top and bottom, namely between the geometric tunic with a quiet oriental flair and the billowy light skirt with soft pleating.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/fashion_show_photos_.working_process: Horizontal parallel topstitching with 1 cm spacing; flat pleating in various depths

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_drawings/c.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_drawings/c.description: Coat in gray/black zigzag wool. Knee-length kimono style cut with hood, capacious sleeves, slanted besom pockets (4 cm). Wool/silk edging on hood and front. Tunic in white silk georgette. Straight 7/8 cut with wide round neck, short sleeves. White jet beading all over. Skirt in wool/silk satin with gorgeous sheen. Tubular style, knee length.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_drawings/c.materials: Zigzag pattern wool (Distel, Paris; art. 960, col. 561; 100% wool), wool/silk satin (Taroni, Como; art. 17055, col. black; 66% wool, 27% silk, 7% nylon), silk georgette (Clerici Tessuto, Como), crystal jet
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_drawings/c.remark: The winning element here is the very Ferré masculine/feminine material mix where delicate tone-on-tone beading (tunic) contrasts playfully with a zigzag pattern (coat).
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_drawings/c.working_process: Allover hand embroidery with small jet beading

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_drawings/c.working_process: Horizontal parallel topstitching with 1 cm spacing; flat pleating in various depths

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_drawings/c.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_drawings/c.description: T-shirt in black breitschwanz with white silk satin collar and black silk satin bow. Skirt in two-layer black silk georgette with hip-hugging basque. Soft flat pleating, deep front slit. Ankle length.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_drawings/c.materials: Black breitschwanz fur, silk georgette (Clerici Tessuto, Como; art. 01031, col. black), silk satin
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_drawings/c.remark: The unusual use of fur, lusciously soft thanks to a special treatment, takes the concept of ultra simple tee to the next level. Equally interesting is the contrast between superlight georgette fabric and thick rich breitschwanz fur.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_drawings/c.working_process: Fine flat pleating with even 3 cm spacing

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_drawings/c.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_drawings/c.description: T-shirt in black breitschwanz with white silk satin collar and black silk satin bow. Skirt in two-layer black silk georgette with hip-hugging basque. Soft flat pleating, deep front slit. Ankle length.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_drawings/c.materials: Black breitschwanz fur, silk georgette (Clerici Tessuto, Como; art. 01031, col. black), silk satin

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_drawings/c.working_process: Fine flat pleating with even 3 cm spacing

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_drawings/c.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_drawings/c.description: Cape in macro tartan print silk serge. A-line cut, floor length (longer in back). Shawl collar, capacious sleeves. Fully reversible thanks to the doubling in rich dark marten fur. Skirt in macro tartan print silk serge. Slim line, floor length, side slit. Bustier in cotton piqué with allover topstitching for a stiffish feel. Short, (upper) hip skimming. Sash in black silk taffeta
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_drawings/c.materials: White&black yarn-dyed silk serge with red/blue/green/black macro tartan print (Stucchi, Como; art. 4695, 100% silk); dark brown marten fur, white 100% cotton piqué, pure silk taffeta (col. black)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_drawings/c.remark: The utter opulence of the cape – as in the voluminous shape complete with hint of a train, the luscious warmth of the magnificent marten lining and the glossy/matte texture of the silk serge fabric – comes close to sparking images of royal court pomp.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_drawings/c.working_process: Horizontal 1 cm parallel topstitching all over bodice and sash

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_drawings/c.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_drawings/c.description: Cape in macro tartan print silk serge. A-line cut, floor length (longer in back). Shawl collar, capacious sleeves. Fully reversible thanks to the doubling in rich dark marten fur. Skirt in macro tartan print silk serge. Slim line, floor length, side slit. Bustier in cotton piqué with allover topstitching for a stiffish feel. Short, (upper) hip skimming. Sash in black silk taffeta
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_drawings/c.materials: White&black yarn-dyed silk serge with red/blue/green/black macro tartan print (Stucchi, Como; art. 4695, 100% silk); dark brown marten fur, white 100% cotton piqué, pure silk taffeta (col. black)

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/619.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/619.description: T-shirt in black breitschwanz with white silk satin collar and black silk satin bow. Skirt in two-layer black silk georgette with hip-hugging basque. Soft flat pleating, deep front slit. Ankle length.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/619.materials: Black breitschwanz fur, silk georgette (Clerici Tessuto, Como; art. 01031, col. black), silk satin
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/619.remark: The unusual use of fur, lusciously soft thanks to a special treatment, takes the concept of ultra simple tee to the next level. Equally interesting is the contrast between superlight georgette fabric and thick rich breitschwanz fur.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/619.working_process: Fine flat pleating with even 3 cm spacing

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/630.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (scritta oro)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/630.acquisition: Spazio FGF c/o Open Care - Milano
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/630.description: Giacca in jersey ; monopetto; revers a uomo; spalle importanti di linea arrotondata. Vestibilità asciutta al punto vita, sottolineato da un taglio orizzontale;lunghezza ai fianchi; allacciatura a un bottone; tasche rettangolari applicate; cintura dello stesso tessuto, con profilo e fibbia ricoperti in faille di seta. Gonna in faille di seta e jersey di lana accoppiati e impunturati ; struttura a due teli,linea asciutta; lunghezza al ginocchio e cinturetta in vita. T-shirt in jersey di lana; girocollo bordato (cm 1) in faille di seta; maniche corte; lunghezza ai fianchi;punto vita sottolineato da un taglio orizzontale; chiusura con zip sul dorso. Stola in jersey e faille abbinati e impunturati; composta da un grande rettangolo i cui lati corti sono ripiegati verso il centro e fissati in modo da creare un passaggio per le braccia.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/630.materials: Faille di seta grigio (Clerici Tessuto, Como ; art.01404, col. 413); jersey melange grigio (Lanapon/Sisan, Milano ; art. 10718, col 120, 100% lana)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/630.remark: Interessante è l’equilibrio tra gli stilemi della utility “fashion” degli anni ‘40 e i canoni degli ‘80. L’essere un capo couture è dato dall’effetto di opulenza , evidenziato ai lati della silhouette e sul dietro, suggerito dalla stola.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/630.working_process: Impunture orizzontali, parallele a 1 cm, a copertura totale sui due tessuti - jersey e seta - abbinati.

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/630.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/630.description: Tunic in cashmere knit fabric with stitched silk georgette doubling. High neck, long wide tubular sleeves, linear 7/8 cut with metal button fastening on left shoulder. Skirt in two-layer georgette. Ankle length, hip-hugging basque, skinny waistband.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/630.materials: Cashmere knit (Maglificio di Vignola, Vignola), silk georgette, silk print fabric (Sisan, Como; art. 219; des. 941, var. 6)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/630.remark: What makes the outfit distinctive is the opposition between top and bottom, namely between the geometric tunic with a quiet oriental flair and the billowy light skirt with soft pleating.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/630.working_process: Horizontal parallel topstitching with 1 cm spacing; flat pleating in various depths

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.description: Jacket in black silk gazar. Hip-skimming circular cut with high gloss wool/silk edging. Dress in black silk gazaar with long sleeves and low-cut V neckline. Knee length. Lavish trumpet effect in front thanks to a semi-circular panel with matching cinch belt at waist.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.materials: Silk gazaar (Taroni, Como; art. 2829 100% silk; col. black), wool/silk blend fabric (Taroni, Como; art. 17055 66% wool, 27% silk 7% nylon; col. black)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.remark: This outfit offers a glimpse of Ferré’s architectural training. Essential to giving extra volume to the jacket is the basic geometric design, as what creates the effect of (in reality non-existent) sleeves is the round piece of fabric folded over and kept in place by artful stitching. Another geometric shape – the semi circle – adds volume to the front of the dress through the use of a belt.

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.description: Cape in macro tartan print silk serge with full doubling in same fabric. A-line cut, floor length. Shawl collar, capacious sleeves. Skirt in macro tartan print silk serge. Slim line, floor length, front slit. A herringbone effect in front thanks to the two-section bias cut. Back on the grain in sync with the tartan pattern. Bustier in cotton piqué with allover topstitching for a stifffish feel. Short, hip skimming style. Sash in black silk taffeta.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.materials: White&black yarn-dyed silk serge with red/blue/green/black macro tartan print (Stucchi, Como; art. 4695, 100% silk); white 100% cotton piqué, pure silk taffeta (col. black)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.remark: Capturing the imagination here is the opulent tartan print. The use of this pattern on the bias for the front part of the skirt adds a strong element of graphic contrast to the whole.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.working_process: Horizontal 1 cm parallel topstitching all over bodice and sash

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.description: Cape in macro tartan print silk serge. A-line cut, floor length (longer in back). Shawl collar, capacious sleeves. Fully reversible thanks to the doubling in rich dark marten fur. Skirt in macro tartan print silk serge. Slim line, floor length, side slit. Bustier in cotton piqué with allover topstitching for a stiffish feel. Short, (upper) hip skimming. Sash in black silk taffeta
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.materials: White&black yarn-dyed silk serge with red/blue/green/black macro tartan print (Stucchi, Como; art. 4695, 100% silk); dark brown marten fur, white 100% cotton piqué, pure silk taffeta (col. black)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.remark: The utter opulence of the cape – as in the voluminous shape complete with hint of a train, the luscious warmth of the magnificent marten lining and the glossy/matte texture of the silk serge fabric – comes close to sparking images of royal court pomp.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.working_process: Horizontal 1 cm parallel topstitching all over bodice and sash

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.description: Top in black velvet with allover topstitching. Sleeveless, (upper) hip skimming. Round neck in front, total rectangular low cut in back. Belt in black velvet with soft nappa leather covered buckle. Skirt in macro tartan print silk with all the impression of a two-part construction: underneath, a floor-length body-hugging skirt with deep front slit; on top, a richly and softly pleated panel cinched by the belt with openings front & back. Stole in rectangular cut, with one corner of the short end folded toward center and fixed in place to form a funnel style sleeve.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.materials: Silk velvet (Redaelli velvets, art. Yvonne super, col. black), white&black yarn-dyed silk serge with red/blue/green/black macro tartan print (Stucchi, Como; art. 4695, 100% silk), silk faille (Taroni, Como; art. 1319, col. black)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.remark: The architect of fashion’s DNA comes through both in the way he finesses the fabric to create the precise volume of the skirt and in the way he designs the stole to attain an emphatic geometric shape – which ultimately embraces the figure with elegance and grace.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.working_process: Horizontal 1 cm parallel topstitching all over the velvet top

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.description: Top short and snug, (upper) hip skimming in length. Halter neck, crisscross ribbon straps down to waist in back. Allover topstitching. Stole in rectangular cut, with one corner of the short end folded toward center and fixed in place to form a funnel style sleeve. Belt in black velvet with soft nappa leather covered buckle. Skirt in macro tartan print silk with all the impression of a two-part construction: underneath, a floor-length body-hugging skirt with deep front slit; on top, a richly and softly pleated panel cinched by the belt with openings front & back.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.materials: Silk velvet (Redaelli velvets, art. Yvonne super, col. black), white&black yarn-dyed silk serge with red/blue/green/black macro tartan print (Stucchi, Como; art. 4695, 100% silk), silk faille (Taroni, Como; art. 1319, col. black)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.remark: Here too the architect of fashion’s DNA emerges equally in the way he finesses the fabric to create the precise volume of the skirt and in the way he designs the stole to attain an emphatic geometric shape – which ultimately embraces the figure with elegance and grace.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.working_process: Horizonal 1 cm parallel topstitching all over the velvet top and the stole

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (scritta oro)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.acquisition: Spazio FGF c/o Open Care - Milano
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.description: Giacca in jersey ; monopetto; revers a uomo; spalle importanti di linea arrotondata.
