ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.description: Coat in gray/black zigzag wool. Knee-length kimono style cut with hood, capacious sleeves, slanted besom pockets (4 cm). Wool/silk edging on hood and front. Tunic in white silk georgette. Straight 7/8 cut with wide round neck, short sleeves. White jet beading all over. Skirt in wool/silk satin with gorgeous sheen. Tubular style, knee length.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.materials: Zigzag pattern wool (Distel, Paris; art. 960, col. 561; 100% wool), wool/silk satin (Taroni, Como; art. 17055, col. black; 66% wool, 27% silk, 7% nylon), silk georgette (Clerici Tessuto, Como), crystal jet
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.remark: The winning element here is the very Ferré masculine/feminine material mix where delicate tone-on-tone beading (tunic) contrasts playfully with a zigzag pattern (coat).
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.working_process: Allover hand embroidery with small jet beading

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.description: Tunic in cashmere knit fabric with stitched silk georgette doubling. High neck, long wide tubular sleeves, linear 7/8 cut with metal button fastening on left shoulder. Skirt in two-layer georgette. Ankle length, hip-hugging basque, skinny waistband.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.materials: Cashmere knit (Maglificio di Vignola, Vignola), silk georgette, silk print fabric (Sisan, Como; art. 219; des. 941, var. 6)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.remark: What makes the outfit distinctive is the opposition between top and bottom, namely between the geometric tunic with a quiet oriental flair and the billowy light skirt with soft pleating.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.working_process: Horizontal parallel topstitching with 1 cm spacing; flat pleating in various depths

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.description: Caban in dove gray silk organza with cornely embroidery. 7/8 length, kimono sleeves, no collar. T-shirt in dove gray silk chiffon with cornely embroidery. Hip skimming. Skirt in gray wool grisaille fabric. Straight knee-length cut. Sash in gray silk faille with 1 cm parallel topstitching.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.materials: Silk organza, wool grisaille (Loro Piana, Quarona Sesia), silk faille, silk chiffon; viscose ribbon
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.remark: The elementary geo shapes of jacket and T-shirt find a perfect sense of counterpoint in the gorgeous material with rich embroidery and glossy/matte texture.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.working_process: Serpentine & spiral cornely embroidery with viscose ribbon (Ricamificio Damiani)

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.description: Jacket in black silk gazar. Hip-skimming circular cut with high gloss wool/silk edging. Dress in black silk gazaar with long sleeves and low-cut V neckline. Knee length. Lavish trumpet effect in front thanks to a semi-circular panel with matching cinch belt at waist.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.materials: Silk gazaar (Taroni, Como; art. 2829 100% silk; col. black), wool/silk blend fabric (Taroni, Como; art. 17055 66% wool, 27% silk 7% nylon; col. black)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.remark: This outfit offers a glimpse of Ferré’s architectural training. Essential to giving extra volume to the jacket is the basic geometric design, as what creates the effect of (in reality non-existent) sleeves is the round piece of fabric folded over and kept in place by artful stitching. Another geometric shape – the semi circle – adds volume to the front of the dress through the use of a belt.

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.description: Tunica in georgette di seta grigia completamente ricamata; profondo scollo a V; manica lunga a tubo; linea a stringere al fondo; lunghezza 7/8 . Gonna in lana-seta nera; linea asciutta; lunghezza al ginocchio.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.materials: Silk georgette (Taroni, Como), wool/silk satin (Taroni, Como; art. 17055, col. black), strass and jets in gray, white and anthracite tones
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.remark: What’s remarkable here is how an item reminiscent of a maxi pullover, semi homewear mode, can go totally glam thanks to beading creating the illusion of a shimmering tweed fabric.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.working_process: Allover hand beading with tweedy effect

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.description: Long dress with black velvet bodice and slim b&w chalkstripe silk cady skirt. Silk taffeta belt complete with decorative topstitching. Stole in chalkstripe cady with black organza on the underside. A stunning wrap construction with all the flair of a giant ribbon.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.exhibitions: “Italian Style since 1945”, Victoria and Albert Museum, London, 2015
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.materials: Black&white chalkstripe print silk cady (Taroni, Como; art. 6422, des. 25, col. 1), silk velvet (Redaelli velvet; art. Prestige super; col. black), silk taffeta, silk organza
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.remark: Bordering between sleek feminine severity and slinky sari type silhouette, this dress makes a strong impact on both graphic and chromatic levels. Another point of interest is the revisitation in evening version of a supremely mannish chalkstripe pattern.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.working_process: Parallel topstitching with 1 cm spacing for bow

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.description: Ankle-length dress cut at waist with 6-panel bustier whalebone bodice in black & white horizontal pinstripe cady and superslim 4-panel skirt in vertical stripe cady. Medium high slit on left. Silk taffeta ribbon belt with decorative topstitching. Long slender white silk gazar stole with white silk organza lining, softly embracing arms and shoulders.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.exhibitions:
“Ferré. Abito come accento che esce dal corpo”, area Bernardelli, Mantova, 2015
“Gianfranco Ferré Designs”, Phoenix Art Museum, 2015
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.materials: Black&white chalkstripe print silk cady (Taroni, Como; art. 6422, des. 25, col. 1), silk gazar (Taroni, Como; art. 17028, col. 3020), silk taffeta, silk organza
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.remark: The sense of illusion is clear: what appears to be an exquisitely simple strapless one-sleeve blouse is actually a stole referencing both Indian sari and Japanese origami. Accentuating the severity elegance further is the use of mannish chalkstripes – ever a Ferré favorite – to create a singular graphic effect essential to the designer’s rethinking of feminine chic. Another must in the Ferré fashion lexicon is the wide ribbon style belt with decorative topstitching and magnificent bow flourish.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.bibliography:
“Gianfranco Ferré. Lessons in Fashion”, Maria Luisa Frisa (edited by), Marsilio, Venezia, 2009; “Moda. Dalla nascita della
haute couture a oggi”, Sofia Gnoli, Carocci Editore, Roma, 2012.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.working_process: Parallel topstitching with 1 cm spacing for bow

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.description: Cape in ivory silk faille. 7/8 circle cut, capacious sleeves, no collar. Ivory beaver fur lining. Long dress in ivory silk faille. Slim line with two trumpet cut panels in front draping fluidly from shoulder and upper side seams. A wide belt in matching fabric holds the panels softly in place at waist yet only in front.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.materials: Silk faille (Taroni, Como; art. 1319, col. 908), ivory color beaver fur
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.remark: The cape and evening gown are reminiscent of 1950s designs for opening nights at La Scala Opera House in Milan. The sumptuous style is there in the shapes, volumes and proportions. As evident in back, the dress is for the most part slim fit. The ballgown allure comes from the gorgeous material and, best of all, from the two rich paremontures (facings) gently embracing shoulders.

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.description: Jacket in boxy shape. Wide sleeves, no collar or closure. Ivory beaver fur lining. Shirt in ivory silk faille. Ample line narrowing gently toward bottom. Long sleeves. Collar and wide lapels held firmly in place at waist, no fastening. Skirt in black silk faille. Long and lavish with double construction: underneath, skinny skirt with three-button front fastening; on top, fully circular one totally open in front.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.materials: Silk faille (Taroni, Como; art. 1319, col. black & col. 908), ivory color beaver fur
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.remark: This fabulous evening outfit sparks images of emphatic 1950s femininity. Complete with new and interesting tweaks, as in the boxy jacket versus the ballgown skirt.

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.description: Long dress in black silk faille with trompe-l’oeil construction, namely mimicking a slimline shirtwaist worn backwards. Circular panels starting at shoulders and passing firmly under the cinch belt create an overskirt effect open in front.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.materials: Silk faille (Taroni, Como; art. 1319, col. black, 100% silk)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/631.remark: This design offers Gianfranco Ferré the opportunity to enjoy one of his favorite pastimes: playing an other-way-around game. Simply by switching front and back, the designer succeeds in turning a classic shirtwaist into a gorgeous ballgown. He conducts innovative and thoughtful research on clothing construction, then works his special magic by adding the two panels that give an appearance of volume to the skirt.

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/632.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/632.description: Cape in macro tartan print silk serge with full doubling in same fabric. A-line cut, floor length. Shawl collar, capacious sleeves. Skirt in macro tartan print silk serge. Slim line, floor length, front slit. A herringbone effect in front thanks to the two-section bias cut. Back on the grain in sync with the tartan pattern. Bustier in cotton piqué with allover topstitching for a stifffish feel. Short, hip skimming style. Sash in black silk taffeta.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/632.materials: White&black yarn-dyed silk serge with red/blue/green/black macro tartan print (Stucchi, Como; art. 4695, 100% silk); white 100% cotton piqué, pure silk taffeta (col. black)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/632.remark: Capturing the imagination here is the opulent tartan print. The use of this pattern on the bias for the front part of the skirt adds a strong element of graphic contrast to the whole.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/632.working_process: Horizontal 1 cm parallel topstitching all over bodice and sash

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/632.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/632.description: Cape in macro tartan print silk serge. A-line cut, floor length (longer in back). Shawl collar, capacious sleeves. Fully reversible thanks to the doubling in rich dark marten fur. Skirt in macro tartan print silk serge. Slim line, floor length, side slit. Bustier in cotton piqué with allover topstitching for a stiffish feel. Short, (upper) hip skimming. Sash in black silk taffeta
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/632.materials: White&black yarn-dyed silk serge with red/blue/green/black macro tartan print (Stucchi, Como; art. 4695, 100% silk); dark brown marten fur, white 100% cotton piqué, pure silk taffeta (col. black)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/632.remark: The utter opulence of the cape – as in the voluminous shape complete with hint of a train, the luscious warmth of the magnificent marten lining and the glossy/matte texture of the silk serge fabric – comes close to sparking images of royal court pomp.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/632.working_process: Horizontal 1 cm parallel topstitching all over bodice and sash

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/632.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/632.description: Top in black velvet with allover topstitching. Sleeveless, (upper) hip skimming. Round neck in front, total rectangular low cut in back. Belt in black velvet with soft nappa leather covered buckle. Skirt in macro tartan print silk with all the impression of a two-part construction: underneath, a floor-length body-hugging skirt with deep front slit; on top, a richly and softly pleated panel cinched by the belt with openings front & back. Stole in rectangular cut, with one corner of the short end folded toward center and fixed in place to form a funnel style sleeve.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/632.materials: Silk velvet (Redaelli velvets, art. Yvonne super, col. black), white&black yarn-dyed silk serge with red/blue/green/black macro tartan print (Stucchi, Como; art. 4695, 100% silk), silk faille (Taroni, Como; art. 1319, col. black)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/632.remark: The architect of fashion’s DNA comes through both in the way he finesses the fabric to create the precise volume of the skirt and in the way he designs the stole to attain an emphatic geometric shape – which ultimately embraces the figure with elegance and grace.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/632.working_process: Horizontal 1 cm parallel topstitching all over the velvet top

ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/632.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/632.description: Top short and snug, (upper) hip skimming in length. Halter neck, crisscross ribbon straps down to waist in back. Allover topstitching. Stole in rectangular cut, with one corner of the short end folded toward center and fixed in place to form a funnel style sleeve. Belt in black velvet with soft nappa leather covered buckle. Skirt in macro tartan print silk with all the impression of a two-part construction: underneath, a floor-length body-hugging skirt with deep front slit; on top, a richly and softly pleated panel cinched by the belt with openings front & back.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/632.materials: Silk velvet (Redaelli velvets, art. Yvonne super, col. black), white&black yarn-dyed silk serge with red/blue/green/black macro tartan print (Stucchi, Como; art. 4695, 100% silk), silk faille (Taroni, Como; art. 1319, col. black)
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/632.remark: Here too the architect of fashion’s DNA emerges equally in the way he finesses the fabric to create the precise volume of the skirt and in the way he designs the stole to attain an emphatic geometric shape – which ultimately embraces the figure with elegance and grace.
ALTA-MODA/FW1986-87/technical_sheets/632.working_process: Horizonal 1 cm parallel topstitching all over the velvet top and the stole

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/advertising/slides/6.description: Canotta di linea aderente, priva di maniche e lunga al secondo fianco, con chiusura anteriore a girocollo e profonda scollatura a V sul retro. Il completo è completamente ricoperto da paillettes sino all’alta bordura inferiore in pelliccia, che nasconde, posteriormente, una piccola chiusura a zip.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/advertising/slides/6.materials: Georgette di seta marrone, pelliccia di volpe al naturale, paillettes a stampa cangiante ad effetto tartaruga
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/advertising/slides/6.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (scritta oro)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/advertising/slides/6.description: Dress in dark wine red silk velvet. Strapless bodice with topstitching. Long lavishly flaring skirt with three-part construction. Two shorter sections in front, one longer one in back with hint of a train. Black nylon crinoline petticoat with three gold lamé plisse flounces peeking out from under the skirt’s asymmetric hemline.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/advertising/slides/6.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/advertising/slides/6.remark: The dark lady is back, in strapless version with long elegant evening gloves and again the glimpse of gold plisse flounces. All marks of an exquisitely enticing femininity.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/advertising/slides/6.materials: Silk velvet (Stucchi, Como), black nylon, gold lurex lace, gold sequins
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/advertising/slides/6.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/advertising/slides/6.working_process: Sunburst pleating on petticoat flounces; gold sequining

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/advertising/slides/6.object: Completo composto da soprabito e abito
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/advertising/slides/6.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (scritta oro)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/advertising/slides/6.description: Jacket in black grain de poudre wool. High waist, amphora shape. Radial arm construction with narrowing toward lower edge of sleeve. Round tip lapels down to waist. One-button closure. Besom pockets, plus a flap pocket on left. Knee-skimming length. Black silk crepe de chine lining. Skirt in black grain de poudre wool. Four panel construction. Slim line, knee length. Shirt in white tubular silk georgette. Kimono style sleeves narrowing at slit cuff. Mannish silk satin collar in bombé cut. Hip- hugging basque for a blousy effect. Bow in brown silk taffeta. Long and wide (5 cm) with 1 cm parallel topstiching.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/advertising/slides/6.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/advertising/slides/6.remark: Here’s another outfit capturing to perfection Gianfranco Ferré’s passion for mingling masculine and feminine fashion with thoughtful elegance. The extralong jacket references the 19th century men’s tailcoat, where the new bombé styling in no way took away from the original design of this classic article of bourgeois clothing.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/advertising/slides/6.materials: Grain de poudre wool (Schontess, Milano; art. 799, col. black), pure silk tubular georgette (Clerici Tessuto, art. 1754, des. 110), silk satin, silk taffeta, silk crepe de chine
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/advertising/slides/6.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/advertising/slides/6.description: Canotta di linea aderente, priva di maniche e lunga al secondo fianco, con chiusura anteriore a girocollo e profonda scollatura a V sul retro. Il completo è completamente ricoperto da paillettes sino all’alta bordura inferiore in pelliccia, che nasconde, posteriormente, una piccola chiusura a zip.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/advertising/slides/6.materials: Georgette di seta marrone, pelliccia di volpe al naturale, paillettes a stampa cangiante ad effetto tartaruga
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/advertising/slides/6.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (scritta oro)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/advertising/slides/6.object: Completo composto da soprabito e abito
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/advertising/slides/6.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (scritta oro)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/advertising/social_m.object: Completo composto da soprabito e abito
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/advertising/social_m.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (scritta oro)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/backstage/54906.jpg.description: Dress bustier style. Form fit, knee length. With silk tape on brown organza silk lining zigzagging across the whole dress. Silk taffeta ribbon on bodice, knotting into a bow complete with big velvet pansy
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/backstage/54906.jpg.remark: This dress is clearly an expression of Gianfranco Ferré’s intrinsic passion for hyperbole, his pursuit of elements of exaggeration and excess (in reality, always calculated and calibrated to perfection)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/backstage/54906.jpg.materials: Silk organza (Clerici Tessuto, Como), 1 cm wide silk tape, silk taffeta (Clerici Tessuto, Como)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/backstage/54906.jpg.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/backstage/54906.jpg.working_process: Extensive application of silk tape; parallel topstitching with 1 cm spacing

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.description: Abito – bustier composto da più elementi che si sovrappongono: il bustino è formato da due tronchi di cono che si aprono a corolla sul davanti; la parte inferiore è costituita da una gonna a ¾ di ruota su cui è cucito un elemento a mezza ruota a formare pieghe. La crinolina di nylon inserita nei profili esterni sostiene le ampiezze e favorisce un effetto plastico e tridimensionale.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.remark: Tutto si arrotonda, tutto si dilata. Il capo ondeggia nella sua ruota quasi conica con un movimento fermato nel tempo, in perfetto equilibrio di volumi e proporzioni.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.materials: Taffeta di seta (Clerici Tessuto, Como art. 0802 - col. nero) trapunto e matelassé; duchesse di seta (Clerici Tessuto, Como); crinolina di nylon.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (scritta oro)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.acquisition: Spazio FGF c/o Open Care - Milano
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.working_process: impunture parallele a mm10 seguono l’andamento delle forme geometriche del capo

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.description: Dress redingote style in black cutwork silk crêpe with black silk satin lining. Slim bodice with little lapel collar, padded shoulders, long narrow sleeves. Front metal-clasp closure with small overlay. Skirt with lovely A-line flare. Under the collar are big black organza & velvet leaf appliqués, with matching topstitched silk satin ribbon to knot below. Black organza lining for top part of the dress. Then for added fullness, the flaring skirt has a big nylon flounce on the inside.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.remark: Here’s a 20th century take (very much in feminine version) on the 18th century young man’s redingote. Distinguishing features include the silk crêpe fabric complete with meticulous cutwork: the classic eyelet effect is the amazing result of hand craftsmanship performed on the finished garment.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.materials: Silk crepe, silk satin, silk organza, cotton velvet, nylon
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.working_process: Silk fabric all in cutwork motif

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.description: Dress in brown silk taffeta with decorative topstitching. Slim strapless bodice in double layer of silk faille (30 cm wide ribbon) crisscrossing neatly in front and then knotting obi style in back. Under the bustline a circular panel of topstitched silk taffeta flares beautifully outward from large fluid pleats.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.remark: This dress captures an at once perfect and singular balance of shapes, volumes, proportions: an amazing sum of parts in sublime opposition to one another.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.materials: Silk taffeta (Taroni, Como; art. 3057, var. 824), silk faille (Clerici Tessuto; Como), nylon
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.working_process: 1 cm. parallel topstitching all along the circular panel

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.description: Dress in black wool crepe with eight-part construction. Long lavishly flaring skirt with asymmetric front hem. Underneath, black nylon crinoline petticoat with three gold lamé plisse flounces. Long bodice with eight-part construction. Round neck, narrow wrist-length sleeves.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.remark: A dark lady of past times. Here the chaste severity of the Victorian Age is offset by quiet elements of wicked femininity, as in the gold flounces with gilt sequins peeking out from under the skirt’s asymmetric hemline.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.materials: Wool crepe (Schontess, Milano), black nylon, gold lurex lace, gold sequins
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.working_process: Sunburst pleating on petticoat flounces; sequining

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.description: Jacket in black grain de poudre wool. High waist, amphora shape. Radial arm construction with narrowing toward lower edge of sleeve. Round tip lapels down to waist. One-button closure. Besom pockets, plus a flap pocket on left. Knee-skimming length. Black silk crepe de chine lining. Skirt in black grain de poudre wool. Four panel construction. Slim line, knee length. Shirt in white tubular silk georgette. Kimono style sleeves narrowing at slit cuff. Mannish silk satin collar in bombé cut. Hip- hugging basque for a blousy effect. Bow in brown silk taffeta. Long and wide (5 cm) with 1 cm parallel topstiching.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.remark: Here’s another outfit capturing to perfection Gianfranco Ferré’s passion for mingling masculine and feminine fashion with thoughtful elegance. The extralong jacket references the 19th century men’s tailcoat, where the new bombé styling in no way took away from the original design of this classic article of bourgeois clothing.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.materials: Grain de poudre wool (Schontess, Milano; art. 799, col. black), pure silk tubular georgette (Clerici Tessuto, art. 1754, des. 110), silk satin, silk taffeta, silk crepe de chine
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.description: T-shirt in glossy brown crocodile leather. Elbow-length kimono sleeves. Crew neck with opening in back. Pants in brown/white chalkstripe wool. High waist with two tucks. Straight leg, ankle length. Belt in glossy brown crocodile leather with rectangular buckle. Bow in brown/white polkadot chiffon. Lavish proportions with two-button closure. Detachable.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.remark: What makes this outfit elegantly unique and recherché is the synergistic relationship between feminine chic and mannish style, between fanciful dots and severe stripes.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.materials: Chalkstripe wool (Schontess), print silk chiffon (Clerici Tessuto, Como), genuine crocodile leather with high gloss finish
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.object:
Completo tre pezzi
(giacca e t-shirt non presenti in archivio)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (scritta oro)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.object: Completo composto da soprabito e abito
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (scritta oro)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.description: Canotta di linea aderente, priva di maniche e lunga al secondo fianco, con chiusura anteriore a girocollo e profonda scollatura a V sul retro. Il completo è completamente ricoperto da paillettes sino all’alta bordura inferiore in pelliccia, che nasconde, posteriormente, una piccola chiusura a zip.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.materials: Georgette di seta marrone, pelliccia di volpe al naturale, paillettes a stampa cangiante ad effetto tartaruga
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (scritta oro)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.description: Dress bustier style. Form fit, knee length. With silk tape on brown organza silk lining zigzagging across the whole dress. Silk taffeta ribbon on bodice, knotting into a bow complete with big velvet pansy
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.remark: This dress is clearly an expression of Gianfranco Ferré’s intrinsic passion for hyperbole, his pursuit of elements of exaggeration and excess (in reality, always calculated and calibrated to perfection)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.materials: Silk organza (Clerici Tessuto, Como), 1 cm wide silk tape, silk taffeta (Clerici Tessuto, Como)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.working_process: Extensive application of silk tape; parallel topstitching with 1 cm spacing

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.description: Dress with brown/black macro houndstooth check silk skirt. Slim line, knee length, wrap style closure in back with diagonally overlapping edges. Form-fitting bustier bodice in black lurex lace with truncated cone element (richly embroidered with flowers & spirals) opening on one side to create a corolla effect. Long brown velvet ribbon with 1 cm parallel topstitching.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.remark: Some true hallmarks of the Ferré style confirm the authenticity of this creation: namely, the luxurious materials and the gorgeous details, all at once decorative and structural.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.materials: Silk jacquard (Schoentess, Milano; art. 122, des. 5181, var.1), cotton/lurex lace, silk velvet
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.description: Coat-dress in black silk marocain. Six-part construction, amphora line, ankle length. Kimono style sleeves narrowing toward slit lower edge (to turn up in a cuff). Bombé-cut lapels & mid bottom opening. Black crepe de chine lining. Two black silk taffeta ribbons (20 cm wide) with 1 cm parallel topstitching at sides of upper back knot into a bow.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.remark: While an exquisite expression of severity elegance, this dress holds elements of surprise: the sumptuous decor at right wrist level and the big bow at back waist (totally invisible from the front).
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.materials: Silk marocain (Taroni, Como; art. 17028), silk taffeta (Taroni, Como; art. 2829, col. black
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.description: Dress ballgown style in silk faille with giant stripes (black, white, fuchsia, silver). Slim strapless bodice with low-cut V neckline in back. Voluminous skirt thanks to large fluid pleats. Brown silk floral & spiral embroidery on wide black band at hip level. Black silk gazar lining. Skirt (underneath) in brown silk velvet with 1 cm topstitching. Mid-thigh length. Knotted black silk faille ribbon on waistband.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.remark: The outstanding feature here is the artful exaggeration of volumes and proportions, so revealing once again the designer’s love of hyperbole. As for a totally new effect, it’s there in how in back the large skirt rests on the short slim one underneath simply by making the most of a natural drape.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.materials: Silk faille in wide bands of color (Clerici Tessuto, Como; des. 2, var. 2), silk velvet (Stucchi, Como), silk velvet (Stucchi, Como; col. brown)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.working_process: Complex brown silk relief embroidery; parallel topstiching with 1 cm spacing

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.description: Dress bustier/ballgown style in silk faille with giant stripes (black, white, lilac, silver). Eight-part construction, hourglass shape with skinny bodice and voluminous skirt. Black silk gazar lining. Skirt in black velvet with 1 cm topstitching. Slim fit, mid-thigh length. Black velvet ribbon with decorative topstitching knotted into a bow at front waist.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.remark: Again, the outstanding feature is an artful exaggeration of volumes and proportions revealing the designer’s love of hyperbole. As for a totally new effect, it’s there in how the large skirt rests on the short one underneath simply by making the most of a natural drape. With additional support from the big velvet bow.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.materials: Satin smooth silk faille (Clerici Tessuto, Como; des. 3, var. 4), silk velvet (Stucchi, Como), silk gazar (Clerici Tessuto, Como)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.description: Dress with a bustier made of white cotton honeycomb piqué and a skirt in purple silk faille with black and gold stripes, with a satin weave that does not appear on the reverse side.The panels are assembled with large loose pleats in the skirt and are hollowed out from the waist up. Black silk organza lining. A topstitched satin ribbon at 0.5 cm is attached to the dress, tied in a bow at the front, over which the skirt drapes to form a drape. Nylon crinoline structure supports the shape and weight of the skirt. Brown velvet underskirt; fitted; mid-thigh length.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.present_location: Spazio FGF c/o Open Care - Milano
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.remark: Again, the outstanding feature is an artful exaggeration of volumes and proportions revealing the designer’s love of hyperbole. As for a totally new effect, it’s there in how the long full skirt rests on the short one underneath simply by making the most of a natural drape. With additional support from the big satiny silk bow.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.materials: White piqué; purple silk faille with black and gold stripes (Clerici Tessuto, Como; design 3 var.4); brown silk velvet (Stucchi, Como); black silk organza (Clerici Tessuto, Como); nylon crinoline.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.description: Dress in dark wine red silk velvet. Strapless bodice with topstitching. Long lavishly flaring skirt with three-part construction. Two shorter sections in front, one longer one in back with hint of a train. Black nylon crinoline petticoat with three gold lamé plisse flounces peeking out from under the skirt’s asymmetric hemline.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.remark: The dark lady is back, in strapless version with long elegant evening gloves and again the glimpse of gold plisse flounces. All marks of an exquisitely enticing femininity.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.materials: Silk velvet (Stucchi, Como), black nylon, gold lurex lace, gold sequins
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_drawing.working_process: Sunburst pleating on petticoat flounces; gold sequining

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.notes: floral detail on chest, bow at waist

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.materials: Silk velvet (Stucchi, Como), black nylon, gold lurex lace, gold sequins
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.description: Dress in dark wine red silk velvet. Strapless bodice with topstitching. Long lavishly flaring skirt with three-part construction. Two shorter sections in front, one longer one in back with hint of a train. Black nylon crinoline petticoat with three gold lamé plisse flounces peeking out from under the skirt’s asymmetric hemline.

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.materials: Silk taffeta (Taroni, Como; art. 3057, var. 824), silk faille (Clerici Tessuto; Como), nylon
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.description: Dress in brown silk taffeta with decorative topstitching. Slim strapless bodice in double layer of silk faille (30 cm wide ribbon) crisscrossing neatly in front and then knotting obi style in back. Under the bustline a circular panel of topstitched silk taffeta flares beautifully outward from large fluid pleats.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.remark: This dress captures an at once perfect and singular balance of shapes, volumes, proportions: an amazing sum of parts in sublime opposition to one another.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.working_process: 1 cm. parallel topstitching all along the circular panel

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.materials: Silk crepe, silk satin, silk organza, cotton velvet, nylon
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.description: Dress redingote style in black cutwork silk crêpe with black silk satin lining. Slim bodice with little lapel collar, padded shoulders, long narrow sleeves. Front metal-clasp closure with small overlay. Skirt with lovely A-line flare. Under the collar are big black organza & velvet leaf appliqués, with matching topstitched silk satin ribbon to knot below. Black organza lining for top part of the dress. Then for added fullness, the flaring skirt has a big nylon flounce on the inside.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.remark: Here’s a 20th century take (very much in feminine version) on the 18th century young man’s redingote. Distinguishing features include the silk crêpe fabric complete with meticulous cutwork: the classic eyelet effect is the amazing result of hand craftsmanship performed on the finished garment.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.working_process: Silk fabric all in cutwork motif

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.materials: Grain de poudre wool (Schontess, Milano; art. 799, col. black), pure silk tubular georgette (Clerici Tessuto, art. 1754, des. 110), silk satin, silk taffeta, silk crepe de chine
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.description: Jacket in black grain de poudre wool. High waist, amphora shape. Radial arm construction with narrowing toward lower edge of sleeve. Round tip lapels down to waist. One-button closure. Besom pockets, plus a flap pocket on left. Knee-skimming length. Black silk crepe de chine lining. Skirt in black grain de poudre wool. Four panel construction. Slim line, knee length. Shirt in white tubular silk georgette. Kimono style sleeves narrowing at slit cuff. Mannish silk satin collar in bombé cut. Hip- hugging basque for a blousy effect. Bow in brown silk taffeta. Long and wide (5 cm) with 1 cm parallel topstiching.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.remark: Here’s another outfit capturing to perfection Gianfranco Ferré’s passion for mingling masculine and feminine fashion with thoughtful elegance. The extralong jacket references the 19th century men’s tailcoat, where the new bombé styling in no way took away from the original design of this classic article of bourgeois clothing.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.working_process: Parallel topstitching with 1 cm spacing

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.materials: Grain de poudre wool (Schontess, Milano; art. 799, col. black), pure silk tubular georgette (Clerici Tessuto, art. 1754, des. 110), silk satin, silk taffeta, silk crepe de chine

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.materials: Chalkstripe wool (Schontess), print silk chiffon (Clerici Tessuto, Como), genuine crocodile leather with high gloss finish
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.description: T-shirt in glossy brown crocodile leather. Elbow-length kimono sleeves. Crew neck with opening in back. Pants in brown/white chalkstripe wool. High waist with two tucks. Straight leg, ankle length. Belt in glossy brown crocodile leather with rectangular buckle. Bow in brown/white polkadot chiffon. Lavish proportions with two-button closure. Detachable.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.remark: What makes this outfit elegantly unique and recherché is the synergistic relationship between feminine chic and mannish style, between fanciful dots and severe stripes.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.materials: Chalkstripe wool (Schontess), print silk chiffon (Clerici Tessuto, Como), genuine crocodile leather with high gloss finish

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.materials: Georgette di seta marrone, pelliccia di volpe al naturale, paillettes a stampa cangiante ad effetto tartaruga
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.description: Canotta di linea aderente, priva di maniche e lunga al secondo fianco, con chiusura anteriore a girocollo e profonda scollatura a V sul retro. Il completo è completamente ricoperto da paillettes sino all’alta bordura inferiore in pelliccia, che nasconde, posteriormente, una piccola chiusura a zip.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (scritta oro)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.working_process: Applicazioni

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.materials: Georgette di seta marrone, pelliccia di volpe al naturale, paillettes a stampa cangiante ad effetto tartaruga

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.materials: Silk organza (Clerici Tessuto, Como), 1 cm wide silk tape, silk taffeta (Clerici Tessuto, Como)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.description: Dress bustier style. Form fit, knee length. With silk tape on brown organza silk lining zigzagging across the whole dress. Silk taffeta ribbon on bodice, knotting into a bow complete with big velvet pansy
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.remark: This dress is clearly an expression of Gianfranco Ferré’s intrinsic passion for hyperbole, his pursuit of elements of exaggeration and excess (in reality, always calculated and calibrated to perfection)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.working_process: Extensive application of silk tape; parallel topstitching with 1 cm spacing

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.materials: Silk jacquard (Schoentess, Milano; art. 122, des. 5181, var.1), cotton/lurex lace, silk velvet
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.description: Dress with brown/black macro houndstooth check silk skirt. Slim line, knee length, wrap style closure in back with diagonally overlapping edges. Form-fitting bustier bodice in black lurex lace with truncated cone element (richly embroidered with flowers & spirals) opening on one side to create a corolla effect. Long brown velvet ribbon with 1 cm parallel topstitching.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.remark: Some true hallmarks of the Ferré style confirm the authenticity of this creation: namely, the luxurious materials and the gorgeous details, all at once decorative and structural.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.working_process: Complex black silk/lurex embroidery

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.materials: Silk marocain (Taroni, Como; art. 17028), silk taffeta (Taroni, Como; art. 2829, col. black
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.description: Coat-dress in black silk marocain. Six-part construction, amphora line, ankle length. Kimono style sleeves narrowing toward slit lower edge (to turn up in a cuff). Bombé-cut lapels & mid bottom opening. Black crepe de chine lining. Two black silk taffeta ribbons (20 cm wide) with 1 cm parallel topstitching at sides of upper back knot into a bow.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.remark: While an exquisite expression of severity elegance, this dress holds elements of surprise: the sumptuous decor at right wrist level and the big bow at back waist (totally invisible from the front).
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.working_process: Parallel topstitching with 1 cm spacing

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.materials: Taffeta di seta (Clerici Tessuto, Como art. 0802 - col. nero) trapunto e matelassé; duchesse di seta (Clerici Tessuto, Como); crinolina di nylon.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.description: Abito – bustier composto da più elementi che si sovrappongono: il bustino è formato da due tronchi di cono che si aprono a corolla sul davanti; la parte inferiore è costituita da una gonna a ¾ di ruota su cui è cucito un elemento a mezza ruota a formare pieghe. La crinolina di nylon inserita nei profili esterni sostiene le ampiezze e favorisce un effetto plastico e tridimensionale.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.remark: Tutto si arrotonda, tutto si dilata. Il capo ondeggia nella sua ruota quasi conica con un movimento fermato nel tempo, in perfetto equilibrio di volumi e proporzioni.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (scritta oro)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.acquisition: Spazio FGF c/o Open Care - Milano
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.working_process: impunture parallele a mm10 seguono l’andamento delle forme geometriche del capo

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.materials: Silk faille in wide bands of color (Clerici Tessuto, Como; des. 2, var. 2), silk velvet (Stucchi, Como), silk velvet (Stucchi, Como; col. brown)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.description: Dress ballgown style in silk faille with giant stripes (black, white, fuchsia, silver). Slim strapless bodice with low-cut V neckline in back. Voluminous skirt thanks to large fluid pleats. Brown silk floral & spiral embroidery on wide black band at hip level. Black silk gazar lining. Skirt (underneath) in brown silk velvet with 1 cm topstitching. Mid-thigh length. Knotted black silk faille ribbon on waistband.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.remark: The outstanding feature here is the artful exaggeration of volumes and proportions, so revealing once again the designer’s love of hyperbole. As for a totally new effect, it’s there in how in back the large skirt rests on the short slim one underneath simply by making the most of a natural drape.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.working_process: Complex brown silk relief embroidery; parallel topstiching with 1 cm spacing

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.materials: Silk faille in wide bands of color (Clerici Tessuto, Como; des. 2, var. 2), silk velvet (Stucchi, Como), silk velvet (Stucchi, Como; col. brown)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.description: Dress ballgown style in silk faille with giant stripes (black, white, fuchsia, silver). Slim strapless bodice with low-cut V neckline in back. Voluminous skirt thanks to large fluid pleats. Brown silk floral & spiral embroidery on wide black band at hip level. Black silk gazar lining. Skirt (underneath) in brown silk velvet with 1 cm topstitching. Mid-thigh length. Knotted black silk faille ribbon on waistband.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.remark: The outstanding feature here is the artful exaggeration of volumes and proportions, so revealing once again the designer’s love of hyperbole. As for a totally new effect, it’s there in how in back the large skirt rests on the short slim one underneath simply by making the most of a natural drape.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.working_process: Complex brown silk relief embroidery; parallel topstiching with 1 cm spacing

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.materials: Silk faille with wide bands of color (Clerici Tessuto, Como; des. 3, var. 3), silk velvet (Stucchi, Como), silk faille (Clerici Tessuto, Como)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.description: Dress ballgown style in silk faille with giant stripes (black, white, fuchsia, gold). Voluminous skirt thanks to large fluid pleats. Strapless form-fit bodice complete with flounce element in topstitched black velvet, essentially a long ribbon that crisscrosses in back and knots into a bow. Skirt (underneath) in black velvet with allover topstitching. Slim line, knee length.

Eight-part construction, hourglass shape with skinny bodice and voluminous skirt. Black silk gazar lining. Skirt in black velvet with 1 cm topstitching. Slim fit, mid-thigh length. Black velvet ribbon with decorative topstitching knotted into a bow at front waist.

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.materials: White piqué; purple silk faille with black and gold stripes (Clerici Tessuto, Como; design 3 var.4); brown silk velvet (Stucchi, Como); black silk organza (Clerici Tessuto, Como); nylon crinoline.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.description: Dress with a bustier made of white cotton honeycomb piqué and a skirt in purple silk faille with black and gold stripes, with a satin weave that does not appear on the reverse side.The panels are assembled with large loose pleats in the skirt and are hollowed out from the waist up. Black silk organza lining. A topstitched satin ribbon at 0.5 cm is attached to the dress, tied in a bow at the front, over which the skirt drapes to form a drape. Nylon crinoline structure supports the shape and weight of the skirt. Brown velvet underskirt; fitted; mid-thigh length.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.present_location: Spazio FGF c/o Open Care - Milano
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.remark: Again, the outstanding feature is an artful exaggeration of volumes and proportions revealing the designer’s love of hyperbole. As for a totally new effect, it’s there in how the long full skirt rests on the short one underneath simply by making the most of a natural drape. With additional support from the big satiny silk bow.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.working_process: Parallel topstitching at 0.5 cm, embroidery.

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.materials: Wool crepe (Schontess, Milano), black nylon, gold lurex lace, gold sequins
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.description: Dress in black wool crepe with eight-part construction. Long lavishly flaring skirt with asymmetric front hem. Underneath, black nylon crinoline petticoat with three gold lamé plisse flounces. Long bodice with eight-part construction. Round neck, narrow wrist-length sleeves.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.remark: A dark lady of past times. Here the chaste severity of the Victorian Age is offset by quiet elements of wicked femininity, as in the gold flounces with gilt sequins peeking out from under the skirt’s asymmetric hemline.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.working_process: Sunburst pleating on petticoat flounces; sequining

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.materials: Wool crepe (Schontess, Milano), black nylon, gold lurex lace, gold sequins

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.materials: Silk velvet (Stucchi, Como), black nylon, gold lurex lace, gold sequins
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.description: Dress in dark wine red silk velvet. Strapless bodice with topstitching. Long lavishly flaring skirt with three-part construction. Two shorter sections in front, one longer one in back with hint of a train. Black nylon crinoline petticoat with three gold lamé plisse flounces peeking out from under the skirt’s asymmetric hemline.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.remark: The dark lady is back, in strapless version with long elegant evening gloves and again the glimpse of gold plisse flounces. All marks of an exquisitely enticing femininity.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/fashion_show_photos/.working_process: Sunburst pleating on petticoat flounces; gold sequining

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/material_sheets/6628.description: T-shirt in glossy brown crocodile leather. Elbow-length kimono sleeves. Crew neck with opening in back. Pants in brown/white chalkstripe wool. High waist with two tucks. Straight leg, ankle length. Belt in glossy brown crocodile leather with rectangular buckle. Bow in brown/white polkadot chiffon. Lavish proportions with two-button closure. Detachable.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/material_sheets/6628.remark: What makes this outfit elegantly unique and recherché is the synergistic relationship between feminine chic and mannish style, between fanciful dots and severe stripes.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/material_sheets/6628.materials: Chalkstripe wool (Schontess), print silk chiffon (Clerici Tessuto, Como), genuine crocodile leather with high gloss finish
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/material_sheets/6628.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/material_sheets/6629.object: Completo composto da soprabito e abito
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/material_sheets/6629.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (scritta oro)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/material_sheets/6630.description: Jacket in black grain de poudre wool. High waist, amphora shape. Radial arm construction with narrowing toward lower edge of sleeve. Round tip lapels down to waist. One-button closure. Besom pockets, plus a flap pocket on left. Knee-skimming length. Black silk crepe de chine lining. Skirt in black grain de poudre wool. Four panel construction. Slim line, knee length. Shirt in white tubular silk georgette. Kimono style sleeves narrowing at slit cuff. Mannish silk satin collar in bombé cut. Hip- hugging basque for a blousy effect. Bow in brown silk taffeta. Long and wide (5 cm) with 1 cm parallel topstiching.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/material_sheets/6630.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/material_sheets/6630.remark: Here’s another outfit capturing to perfection Gianfranco Ferré’s passion for mingling masculine and feminine fashion with thoughtful elegance. The extralong jacket references the 19th century men’s tailcoat, where the new bombé styling in no way took away from the original design of this classic article of bourgeois clothing.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/material_sheets/6630.materials: Grain de poudre wool (Schontess, Milano; art. 799, col. black), pure silk tubular georgette (Clerici Tessuto, art. 1754, des. 110), silk satin, silk taffeta, silk crepe de chine
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/material_sheets/6630.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/material_sheets/6631.description: Dress with brown/black macro houndstooth check silk skirt. Slim line, knee length, wrap style closure in back with diagonally overlapping edges. Form-fitting bustier bodice in black lurex lace with truncated cone element (richly embroidered with flowers & spirals) opening on one side to create a corolla effect. Long brown velvet ribbon with 1 cm parallel topstitching.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/material_sheets/6631.remark: Some true hallmarks of the Ferré style confirm the authenticity of this creation: namely, the luxurious materials and the gorgeous details, all at once decorative and structural.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/material_sheets/6631.materials: Silk jacquard (Schoentess, Milano; art. 122, des. 5181, var.1), cotton/lurex lace, silk velvet
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/material_sheets/6631.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/material_sheets/6631.description: Dress redingote style in black cutwork silk crêpe with black silk satin lining. Slim bodice with little lapel collar, padded shoulders, long narrow sleeves. Front metal-clasp closure with small overlay. Skirt with lovely A-line flare. Under the collar are big black organza & velvet leaf appliqués, with matching topstitched silk satin ribbon to knot below. Black organza lining for top part of the dress. Then for added fullness, the flaring skirt has a big nylon flounce on the inside.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/material_sheets/6631.remark: Here’s a 20th century take (very much in feminine version) on the 18th century young man’s redingote. Distinguishing features include the silk crêpe fabric complete with meticulous cutwork: the classic eyelet effect is the amazing result of hand craftsmanship performed on the finished garment.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/material_sheets/6631.materials: Silk crepe, silk satin, silk organza, cotton velvet, nylon
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/material_sheets/6631.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/material_sheets/6631.working_process: Silk fabric all in cutwork motif

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/material_sheets/6632.description: Dress in brown silk taffeta with decorative topstitching. Slim strapless bodice in double layer of silk faille (30 cm wide ribbon) crisscrossing neatly in front and then knotting obi style in back. Under the bustline a circular panel of topstitched silk taffeta flares beautifully outward from large fluid pleats.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/material_sheets/6632.remark: This dress captures an at once perfect and singular balance of shapes, volumes, proportions: an amazing sum of parts in sublime opposition to one another.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/material_sheets/6632.materials: Silk taffeta (Taroni, Como; art. 3057, var. 824), silk faille (Clerici Tessuto; Como), nylon
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/material_sheets/6632.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/material_sheets/6632.working_process: 1 cm. parallel topstitching all along the circular panel

As for a totally new effect, it’s there in how the long full skirt rests on the short one underneath simply by making the most of a natural drape. ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/press_coverage/month.description: Dress in black wool crepe with eight-part construction. Long lavishly flaring skirt with asymmetric front hem. Underneath, black nylon crinoline petticoat with three gold lamé plisse flounces. Long bodice with eight-part construction. Round neck, narrow wrist-length sleeves.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/press_coverage/month.remark: A dark lady of past times. Here the chaste severity of the Victorian Age is offset by quiet elements of wicked femininity, as in the gold flounces with gilt sequins peeking out from under the skirt’s asymmetric hemline.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/press_coverage/month.materials: Wool crepe (Schontess, Milano), black nylon, gold lurex lace, gold sequins
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/press_coverage/month.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/press_coverage/month.working_process: Sunburst pleating on petticoat flounces; sequining

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/press_coverage/month.description: Dress bustier style. Form fit, knee length. With silk tape on brown organza silk lining zigzagging across the whole dress. Silk taffeta ribbon on bodice, knotting into a bow complete with big velvet pansy
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/press_coverage/month.remark: This dress is clearly an expression of Gianfranco Ferré’s intrinsic passion for hyperbole, his pursuit of elements of exaggeration and excess (in reality, always calculated and calibrated to perfection)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/press_coverage/month.materials: Silk organza (Clerici Tessuto, Como), 1 cm wide silk tape, silk taffeta (Clerici Tessuto, Como)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/press_coverage/month.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/press_coverage/month.description: Dress bustier/ballgown style in silk faille with giant stripes (black, white, lilac, silver). Eight-part construction, hourglass shape with skinny bodice and voluminous skirt. Black silk gazar lining. Skirt in black velvet with 1 cm topstitching. Slim fit, mid-thigh length. Black velvet ribbon with decorative topstitching knotted into a bow at front waist.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/press_coverage/month.remark: Again, the outstanding feature is an artful exaggeration of volumes and proportions revealing the designer’s love of hyperbole. As for a totally new effect, it’s there in how the large skirt rests on the short one underneath simply by making the most of a natural drape. With additional support from the big velvet bow.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/press_coverage/month.materials: Satin smooth silk faille (Clerici Tessuto, Como; des. 3, var. 4), silk velvet (Stucchi, Como), silk gazar (Clerici Tessuto, Como)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/press_coverage/month.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/studies/22949.jpg.description: Coat-dress in black silk marocain. Six-part construction, amphora line, ankle length. Kimono style sleeves narrowing toward slit lower edge (to turn up in a cuff). Bombé-cut lapels & mid bottom opening. Black crepe de chine lining. Two black silk taffeta ribbons (20 cm wide) with 1 cm parallel topstitching at sides of upper back knot into a bow.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/studies/22949.jpg.remark: While an exquisite expression of severity elegance, this dress holds elements of surprise: the sumptuous decor at right wrist level and the big bow at back waist (totally invisible from the front).
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/studies/22949.jpg.materials: Silk marocain (Taroni, Como; art. 17028), silk taffeta (Taroni, Como; art. 2829, col. black
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/studies/22949.jpg.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

Slim strapless bodice in double layer of silk faille (30 cm wide ribbon) crisscrossing neatly in front and then knotting obi style in back. Under the bustline a circular panel of topstitched silk taffeta flares beautifully outward from large fluid pleats.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/studies/22953.jpg.remark: This dress captures an at once perfect and singular balance of shapes, volumes, proportions: an amazing sum of parts in sublime opposition to one another.

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_drawings/c.description: T-shirt in glossy brown crocodile leather. Elbow-length kimono sleeves. Crew neck with opening in back. Pants in brown/white chalkstripe wool. High waist with two tucks. Straight leg, ankle length. Belt in glossy brown crocodile leather with rectangular buckle. Bow in brown/white polkadot chiffon. Lavish proportions with two-button closure. Detachable.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_drawings/c.remark: What makes this outfit elegantly unique and recherché is the synergistic relationship between feminine chic and mannish style, between fanciful dots and severe stripes.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_drawings/c.materials: Chalkstripe wool (Schontess), print silk chiffon (Clerici Tessuto, Como), genuine crocodile leather with high gloss finish
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_drawings/c.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_drawings/c.description: Jacket in black grain de poudre wool. High waist, amphora shape. Radial arm construction with narrowing toward lower edge of sleeve. Round tip lapels down to waist. One-button closure. Besom pockets, plus a flap pocket on left. Knee-skimming length. Black silk crepe de chine lining. Skirt in black grain de poudre wool. Four panel construction. Slim line, knee length. Shirt in white tubular silk georgette. Kimono style sleeves narrowing at slit cuff. Mannish silk satin collar in bombé cut. Hip- hugging basque for a blousy effect. Bow in brown silk taffeta. Long and wide (5 cm) with 1 cm parallel topstiching.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_drawings/c.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_drawings/c.remark: Here’s another outfit capturing to perfection Gianfranco Ferré’s passion for mingling masculine and feminine fashion with thoughtful elegance. The extralong jacket references the 19th century men’s tailcoat, where the new bombé styling in no way took away from the original design of this classic article of bourgeois clothing.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_drawings/c.materials: Grain de poudre wool (Schontess, Milano; art. 799, col. black), pure silk tubular georgette (Clerici Tessuto, art. 1754, des. 110), silk satin, silk taffeta, silk crepe de chine
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_drawings/c.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_drawings/c.description: Dress with brown/black macro houndstooth check silk skirt. Slim line, knee length, wrap style closure in back with diagonally overlapping edges. Form-fitting bustier bodice in black lurex lace with truncated cone element (richly embroidered with flowers & spirals) opening on one side to create a corolla effect. Long brown velvet ribbon with 1 cm parallel topstitching.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_drawings/c.remark: Some true hallmarks of the Ferré style confirm the authenticity of this creation: namely, the luxurious materials and the gorgeous details, all at once decorative and structural.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_drawings/c.materials: Silk jacquard (Schoentess, Milano; art. 122, des. 5181, var.1), cotton/lurex lace, silk velvet
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_drawings/c.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_sheets/636.description: Canotta di linea aderente, priva di maniche e lunga al secondo fianco, con chiusura anteriore a girocollo e profonda scollatura a V sul retro. Il completo è completamente ricoperto da paillettes sino all’alta bordura inferiore in pelliccia, che nasconde, posteriormente, una piccola chiusura a zip.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_sheets/636.materials: Georgette di seta marrone, pelliccia di volpe al naturale, paillettes a stampa cangiante ad effetto tartaruga

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_sheets/636.description: Dress redingote style in black cutwork silk crêpe with black silk satin lining. Slim bodice with little lapel collar, padded shoulders, long narrow sleeves. Front metal-clasp closure with small overlay. Skirt with lovely A-line flare. Under the collar are big black organza & velvet leaf appliqués, with matching topstitched silk satin ribbon to knot below. Black organza lining for top part of the dress. Then for added fullness, the flaring skirt has a big nylon flounce on the inside.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_sheets/636.remark: Here’s a 20th century take (very much in feminine version) on the 18th century young man’s redingote. Distinguishing features include the silk crêpe fabric complete with meticulous cutwork: the classic eyelet effect is the amazing result of hand craftsmanship performed on the finished garment.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_sheets/636.materials: Silk crepe, silk satin, silk organza, cotton velvet, nylon
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_sheets/636.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_sheets/636.description: Abito – bustier composto da più elementi che si sovrappongono: il bustino è formato da due tronchi di cono che si aprono a corolla sul davanti; la parte inferiore è costituita da una gonna a ¾ di ruota su cui è cucito un elemento a mezza ruota a formare pieghe. La crinolina di nylon inserita nei profili esterni sostiene le ampiezze e favorisce un effetto plastico e tridimensionale.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_sheets/636.remark: Tutto si arrotonda, tutto si dilata. Il capo ondeggia nella sua ruota quasi conica con un movimento fermato nel tempo, in perfetto equilibrio di volumi e proporzioni.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_sheets/636.materials: Taffeta di seta (Clerici Tessuto, Como art. 0802 - col. nero) trapunto e matelassé; duchesse di seta (Clerici Tessuto, Como); crinolina di nylon.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_sheets/636.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (scritta oro)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_sheets/636.acquisition: Spazio FGF c/o Open Care - Milano
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_sheets/636.working_process: impunture parallele a mm10 seguono l’andamento delle forme geometriche del capo

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_sheets/636.description: Dress ballgown style in silk faille with giant stripes (black, white, fuchsia, silver). Slim strapless bodice with low-cut V neckline in back. Voluminous skirt thanks to large fluid pleats. Brown silk floral & spiral embroidery on wide black band at hip level. Black silk gazar lining. Skirt (underneath) in brown silk velvet with 1 cm topstitching. Mid-thigh length. Knotted black silk faille ribbon on waistband.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_sheets/636.remark: The outstanding feature here is the artful exaggeration of volumes and proportions, so revealing once again the designer’s love of hyperbole. As for a totally new effect, it’s there in how in back the large skirt rests on the short slim one underneath simply by making the most of a natural drape.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_sheets/636.materials: Silk faille in wide bands of color (Clerici Tessuto, Como; des. 2, var. 2), silk velvet (Stucchi, Como), silk velvet (Stucchi, Como; col. brown)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_sheets/636.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_sheets/636.working_process: Complex brown silk relief embroidery; parallel topstiching with 1 cm spacing

Eight-part construction, hourglass shape with skinny bodice and voluminous skirt. Black silk gazar lining. Skirt in black velvet with 1 cm topstitching. Slim fit, mid-thigh length. ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_sheets/636.description: Dress with a bustier made of white cotton honeycomb piqué and a skirt in purple silk faille with black and gold stripes, with a satin weave that does not appear on the reverse side.The panels are assembled with large loose pleats in the skirt and are hollowed out from the waist up. Black silk organza lining. A topstitched satin ribbon at 0.5 cm is attached to the dress, tied in a bow at the front, over which the skirt drapes to form a drape. Nylon crinoline structure supports the shape and weight of the skirt. Brown velvet underskirt; fitted; mid-thigh length.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_sheets/636.present_location: Spazio FGF c/o Open Care - Milano
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_sheets/636.remark: Again, the outstanding feature is an artful exaggeration of volumes and proportions revealing the designer’s love of hyperbole. As for a totally new effect, it’s there in how the long full skirt rests on the short one underneath simply by making the most of a natural drape. With additional support from the big satiny silk bow.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_sheets/636.materials: White piqué; purple silk faille with black and gold stripes (Clerici Tessuto, Como; design 3 var.4); brown silk velvet (Stucchi, Como); black silk organza (Clerici Tessuto, Como); nylon crinoline.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_sheets/636.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_sheets/637.description: Dress in black wool crepe with eight-part construction. Long lavishly flaring skirt with asymmetric front hem. Underneath, black nylon crinoline petticoat with three gold lamé plisse flounces. Long bodice with eight-part construction. Round neck, narrow wrist-length sleeves.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_sheets/637.remark: A dark lady of past times. Here the chaste severity of the Victorian Age is offset by quiet elements of wicked femininity, as in the gold flounces with gilt sequins peeking out from under the skirt’s asymmetric hemline.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_sheets/637.materials: Wool crepe (Schontess, Milano), black nylon, gold lurex lace, gold sequins
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_sheets/637.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_sheets/637.working_process: Sunburst pleating on petticoat flounces; sequining

ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_sheets/637.description: Dress in dark wine red silk velvet. Strapless bodice with topstitching. Long lavishly flaring skirt with three-part construction. Two shorter sections in front, one longer one in back with hint of a train. Black nylon crinoline petticoat with three gold lamé plisse flounces peeking out from under the skirt’s asymmetric hemline.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_sheets/637.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_sheets/637.remark: The dark lady is back, in strapless version with long elegant evening gloves and again the glimpse of gold plisse flounces. All marks of an exquisitely enticing femininity.
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_sheets/637.materials: Silk velvet (Stucchi, Como), black nylon, gold lurex lace, gold sequins
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_sheets/637.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/FW1987-88/technical_sheets/637.working_process: Sunburst pleating on petticoat flounces; gold sequining

ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/advertising/photocol.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/advertising/photocol.remark: The embroidery on the jacket – where the gracious reference to Pompier art is clear – sparks fond memories of the European salon lifestyle of the late 19th century. Drapery type tassles & cords define the ornamentation on an item essentially modern of cut, while also creating a sense of contrast with the (equally simple of shape) snakeskin skirt. The latter is precious in an aggressive way, thanks to the use of high-tech processes in delineating a new narrative for the basic material.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/advertising/photocol.materials: Wool flannel (Lanapon, art.13702/348A), print wool/silk (Sisan, Milano; art.1095, des.1538), python leather, viscose cord passementerie, wool/viscose embroidery thread
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/advertising/photocol.description: Jacket in wool flannel with thick allover wool/viscose spiral & circle embroidery. Slim hip-skimming line with round neck, long sleeves, no fastening. Extensive cord passementerie in unevenly meandering pattern, held in place here & there by wooden rings with braid covering. Tassles big and small sewn on so as to create an asymmetric effect. Shirt in wool/silk print fabric with straight line, back closure. Small Peter Pan style collar with high neckband support element. Skirt all in horizontal bands of glossy python leather. Slim fit, knee length. Belt in python leather with matching buckle.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/advertising/photocol.working_process: Wool/viscose cornely (machine) embroidery, hand application of tassles plus viscose cord in three different sizes
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/advertising/photocol.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/advertising/photocol.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/advertising/photocol.remark: While filmmaker Luchino Visconti’s masterpiece “Senso” inspires one part of the collection, this dress captures all the allure of opulent Hapsburgian fashion during the Romantic period. Offsetting the sumptuousness is the modern severity elegance of both monochrome black hue and precision-perfect asymmetry.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/advertising/photocol.materials: Silk gazaar (Taroni, Como; art. 2829, var. black)
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/advertising/photocol.description: Black silk gazaar dress with short bustier bodice and trumpet skirt. Two long asymmetric panels at back V neckline draping gently, forming a train. Silk gazar stole hanky style, folded into a triangle, with giant lapel collar attached to it cutting horizontally across the décolleté. Dark red silk velvet & organza rose vine-shoot decor adding to the beauty in back.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/advertising/photocol.exhibitions:
“Ferré. Abito come accento che esce dal corpo”, area Bernardelli, Mantova, 2015, “Gianfranco Ferré Designs”, Phoenix Art
Museum, Phoenix, 2015
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/advertising/photocol.bibliography:
“Gianfranco Ferré. Lessons in Fasion”, Maria Luisa Frisa (edited by), Marsilio, Venezia, 2009; “The history of modern
fashion”, Daniel James Cole and Nancy Deihl, Laurence King Publishing, London, 2015
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/advertising/photocol.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/advertising/photocol.remark: Here too the prime point of interest is the use of intarsiawork silk foulard complete with embroidery for the external layer of the skirt.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/advertising/photocol.materials: Paisley print silk organza (Ratti), silk velvet (Pernet velours; art. 1112, var. 206), foulard style paisley print silk organza (Ratti), paillettes and jets, lace ribbon
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/advertising/photocol.description: Ballgown skirt in voluminous floor length. Exterior layer in six silk print foulards, joined together intarsia mode to form an uninterrupted pattern. Underneath, multiple circular black plisse tulle petticoats (each lifted in front and attached to waist) with lace ribbon trim. Belt in fabric with matching buckle. Top in black silk velvet. Short slim line. Spaghetti straps & piping in black tubular silk. Shawl in silk organza with partial paisley print plus lavish paillette/jet embroidery. Boxy shape.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/advertising/photocol.working_process: Jet/paillette encrustation of print fabric; silk foulard intarsiawork; paisley design embroidery; sunburst pleating
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/advertising/photocol.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/advertising/photocol.remark: Here too the prime point of interest is the use of intarsiawork silk foulard complete with embroidery for the external layer of the skirt.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/advertising/photocol.materials: Paisley print silk organza (Ratti), silk velvet (Pernet velours; art. 1112, var. 206), foulard style paisley print silk organza (Ratti), paillettes and jets, lace ribbon
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/advertising/photocol.description: Ballgown skirt in voluminous floor length. Exterior layer in six silk print foulards, joined together intarsia mode to form an uninterrupted pattern. Underneath, multiple circular black plisse tulle petticoats (each lifted in front and attached to waist) with lace ribbon trim. Belt in fabric with matching buckle. Top in black silk velvet.
