“Ferré. Abito come accento che esce dal corpo”, area Bernardelli, Mantova, 2015, “Gianfranco Ferré Designs”, Phoenix Art
Museum, Phoenix, 2015
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.bibliography:
“Gianfranco Ferré. Lessons in Fasion”, Maria Luisa Frisa (edited by), Marsilio, Venezia, 2009; “The history of modern
fashion”, Daniel James Cole and Nancy Deihl, Laurence King Publishing, London, 2015
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.remark: A main point of interest here is the use of a mannish pinstripe pattern to counterbalance both the magnificence of the delicately voluminous 19th century ballgown style and the exquisite femininity of a skirt complete with beguiling glimpse of the precious layers underneath.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.materials: Black silk gazar with white stripes (Taroni, Como; art. 9967 var. A); black nylon tulle, various weights; ecru silk Chantilly lace (Moda e guarnizioni, Milan; art. 9111); nylon crinoline; silk velvet (Redaelli velvets, Mandello Lario; art. Yvonne super 54902); black silk satin; black silk grosgrain.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.description: Ball gown consisting of a shaped nylon crinoline skirt, gathered and scalloped at the hem, and then machine embroidered with a pattern to imitate white lace. Starting from the waist of the skirt, 9 tiered pleated nylon tulle flounces are applied at different heights. Over this structure is placed an overskirt composed of two circular skirts: the innermost of ivory-colored mechanical Chantilly lace, and the outermost of black silk gazar with white stripes, imitating pinstripes. Floor length. Separate underskirt composed of a black silk satin pencil skirt, fully doubled (not lined). Belt in black silk grosgrain with covered buckle. Fitted black silk velvet top; edges and straps in black silk tubing; length to the high hip. Square shawl in black silk gazar with white stripes, imitating pinstripes, hand-hemmed.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.working_process: Sunburst pleating; machine embroidery with white thread on black tulle with a lace effect.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.exhibitions: “Gianfranco Ferré Designs”, Phoenix Art Museum, Phoenix, 2015
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.remark: This dress too is very much about the long and lavishly full skirt with plisse petticoats underneath.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.materials: Black floral design lace, black lace ribbon, black nylon tulle, black silk velvet, silk velvet (Redaelli velvets, Mandello Lario; art. Yvonne super 54902), black jets and paillettes
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.description: Ballgown skirt circular style, floor length. In multiple layers (each one lifted in front and attached to waist): black plisse tulle for bottom layers, embroidered Chantilly lace for top ones. Belt in fabric with matching buckle. Top in black silk velvet. Short slim line. Spaghetti straps & piping in black tubular silk. Shawl in black lace with jet/paillette embroidery. Boxy shape, handsewn hem.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.working_process: Hand jet/paillette embroidery on lace; sunburst pleating for the tulle
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.remark: The exquisite simplicity of the jewel top makes for a perfect counterpoint to the sumptuousness of the ballgown skirt.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.materials: Lightweight nylon tulle, black lace ribbon, print silk organza (Sisan, Milano; art. 219, des. 1548), garnet red crystal beads
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.description: Ballgown skirt circular style, floor length. In multiple layers of black plisse tulle (each one lifted in front and attached to waist) with lace ribbon trim. Belt in fabric with matching buckle. Top short sleeveless turtleneck style. In print silk with all over garnet red crystal beading. Shawl in black tulle with tone-on-tone garland-stitch hem. Boxy shape.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.working_process: Allover hand beading on print organza; sunburst pleating for the nylon tulle.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.remark: Here the paisley design that comprises the collection’s primary theme makes a strong statement in the form of a gala evening accessory.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.materials: Silk gazar (Clerici Tessuto, Como; art. 1657), nylon cloth, nylon tulle, silk duchesse (Taroni, Como; art. 1324, var. 908), silk organza with partial paisley print (Ratti, Como), paillettes and jets
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.description: Ballgown skirt circular style, floor length. In multiple layers (each one lifted in front and attached to waist): black tulle with sunburst pleats; nylon with garland-stitch hem; on the exterior, silk gazar with wide smocked ruffle. Belt in fabric with matching buckle. Top in ivory silk duchesse. Short slim line. Spaghetti straps & piping in similar tubular silk. Shawl in silk organza with partial paisley print plus lavish paillette/jet embroidery. Boxy shape.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.working_process: Black smocking; black thread embroidery in ringlets and uneven garland stitch; sunburst pleating
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.remark: What’s striking here is the dual use – namely, both structural and decorative – of the print foulard intarsiawork.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.materials: Paisley print silk organza (Ratti, Como; colors: ocher, wine, rust, ivory, blue, black), black nylon tulle, lace ribbon, black silk organza, paillettes and jets
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.description: Ballgown skirt voluminous trumpet style, floor length. Exterior layer in six silk print foulards, joined together intarsia mode to form an uninterrupted pattern. Ditto for bustier bodice. Underneath, multiple circular black plisse tulle petticoats (each lifted in front and attached to waist) with print organza border. Shawl in paisley print silk organza. Boxy shape.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.working_process: Jet/paillette encrustation of print fabric; silk foulard intarsiawork; paisley design embroidery; sunburst pleating
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.remark: Here too the prime point of interest is the use of intarsiawork silk foulard complete with embroidery for the external layer of the skirt.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.materials: Paisley print silk organza (Ratti), silk velvet (Pernet velours; art. 1112, var. 206), foulard style paisley print silk organza (Ratti), paillettes and jets, lace ribbon
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.description: Ballgown skirt in voluminous floor length. Exterior layer in six silk print foulards, joined together intarsia mode to form an uninterrupted pattern. Underneath, multiple circular black plisse tulle petticoats (each lifted in front and attached to waist) with lace ribbon trim. Belt in fabric with matching buckle. Top in black silk velvet. Short slim line. Spaghetti straps & piping in black tubular silk. Shawl in silk organza with partial paisley print plus lavish paillette/jet embroidery. Boxy shape.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.working_process: Jet/paillette encrustation of print fabric; silk foulard intarsiawork; paisley design embroidery; sunburst pleating
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/602.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/603.remark: Thanks to opulent materials (dazzling crystals, fabulous fur) and artful embroidery/intarsiawork, the classic jacket is all set to hit the Gran Galà scene. The match with ultra mannish glen plaid pants is equally innovative, makes for an authentic conversation piece in the realm of couture.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/603.materials: Silk cady (Taroni, Como; art. 16691), wool (Fila, Biella; art. 16200, var. 4211), chinchilla fur (Mondialpelli, Milano), glass tube beads-crystals-paillettes
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/603.description: Jacket in white&black prince of wales (glen plaid) wool with thick allover embroidery/beading. Short boxy cut. Long sleeves, no fastening. Lavish bas-relief design thanks to mix of different techniques & materials. Natural chinchilla trim. Pants in white&black prince of wales wool. Slim mannish style with tucks, pressed pleat, slant pockets. Ankle length. Bustier top in white silk cady with adhesive element. Vertical construction, (upper) hip skimming. Cummerbund in black silk cady.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/603.working_process: Hand embroidery with silver glass tube beads, paillettes, rosette- and teardrop-cut diamond crystals in chrome settings
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/603.label: Gianfranco Ferré (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/603.remark: Elizabethan splendor meets elementary shape in an outfit very much about gorgeous hand embroidery & beading. The body- conscious concept of ornamentation creates a seamless merging of femininity and opulence.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/603.materials: White&black Vichy design wool (Fila, Biella; art. 16200, var. 4201)
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/603.description: Top in short, slim, sleeveless cut. With round neckline. Skirt in white&black Vichy wool with rich allover embroidery. Slim line, high waist, knee length. Lavish bas-relief design thanks to mix of different techniques & materials.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/603.working_process: Hand embroidery with silver glass tube beads, paillettes, rosette- and teardrop-cut diamond crystals in chrome settings
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/603.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/603.description: Giacca corta a bolero in cachemire con ampio collo arrotondato a scialle, maniche voluminose e arricciate nella parte superiore vanno a stringersi al fondo. Bordo inferiore evidenziato da un taglio trasversale.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/603.exhibitions: Gianfranco Ferré e Maria Luigia: Inattese Assonanze”, Palazzo del Governatore, Parma, 2016
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/603.label: GIANFRANCO FERRE' / MADE IN ITALY

ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/603.remark: Di taglio squisitamente maschile e austero: un severo chesterfield monopetto. Il completo risulta decisamente femminilizzato dal cache- col mosso ed enfatizzato dal drappeggio, dalla calda sensualità delle tonalità, dalla raffinatezza dei sovraricami e dai macro-motivi, ricorrenti anche nei tessuti da arredamento del secondo scorcio del XIX secolo.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/603.materials: Lana jacquard a disegno cachemire (Etro, Milano; art. 639 var. 4); raso di seta (Clerici Tessuto,Como; art. 801 var. 874); panno di lana.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/603.description: Cappotto di taglio maschile, dalla linea asciutta; monopetto a due bottoni; revers a lancia; lunghezza al ginocchio. Il tessuto di lana jacquard a disegno paisley è piazzato a scialli. I colori di base di tessitura sono bruciato, bordeaux, ocra e marrone. Il nero è creato da un sovraricamo a mano a punto catenella. Camicia di linea diritta, con chiusura posteriore, in raso di seta bordeaux, con piccolo colletto a punta stondata, sostenuto da una alta pistagna. Gonna di linea asciutta; lunghezza al ginocchio; realizzata con 8 teli verticali in panno di lana nero; apertura con zip sul dietro. Cache-col ad effetto drappeggio irregolare, ottenuto con passaggi di fili che trattengono dall’interno il tessuto.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/603.working_process: Ricamo a mano punto catenella in filo nero, piazzato su disegno paisley jacquard.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/603.exhibitions: “Cachemire. Il Segno in movimento” , Fondazione Antonio Ratti, Villa Sucota/Como e Villa Bernasconi/Cernobbio, 2016
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/603.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (scritta oro)

ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/604.remark: All’asciuttezza della linea della giacca-blazer fanno da contrasto sia le maniche dalla lunghezza esasperata, che necessariamente genera arricciature, sia l’ampiezza dei pantaloni, sostanzialmente estranea ai canoni occidentali. Il motivo paisley, comune a giacca, pantaloni e scialle, assume luci diverse a causa di materiali e lavorazioni diverse nei tre pezzi.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/604.materials: raso di lana e seta stampa paisley (Ratti Donna, Como art.097/21 dis. F28501 e art. 0105/121 dis. 28501); velluto di seta stampa paisley (Ratti Donna Como art. velluto /21 dis. 59465)
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/604.description: Giacca di taglio maschile, monopetto a un bottone; revers a lancia;linea asciutta; lunghezza al fianco; maniche molto lunghe da tenere arricciate. Il capo è in raso di lana e seta stampato a disegno paisley, piazzato a foulard con cornice in tinta unita nera. Colori: bruciato, ocra,bordeaux, rosso e nero. Canotta di linea diritta in raso di seta stampato a disegni paisley (colori come giacca) girocollo, senza maniche. Pantaloni in velluto di seta stampa paisley (colori come giacca). Linea morbida creata da due pieghe che partono dalla cintura; vita alta; chiusura frontale con zip invisibile e bottone a vista. Scialle quadrato imbottito e impunturato: un lato in raso di seta, stampa a disegno paisley piazzato a foulard e l’altro in velluto di seta con stampa all over. Trapuntatura a disegno floreale .
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/604.working_process: Imbottitura e trapuntatura di raso e velluto a stampa paisley abbinati.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/604.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (scritta oro)

ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/604.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/604.remark: Reproducing the structural identity of 1940s furs, the uniqueness of both materials and working processes heightens the impact of volumes and gives the coat a special sensation of impalpable lightness. Expressly contrasting the coat's rich proportions is the slinkiness of the figure-flattering dress, second skin mode. Complete with playful glints and glossy tweed effects. All clearly strong on glamorous allure.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/604.materials: White & black birdseye silk jacquard (Stucchi, Como art. 5384/4001 var. 000/4001), silk organza, high sheen “salt & pepper” viscose passementerie
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/604.description: Boxy long-sleeve crewneck 9/10th coat, buttonless. In silk organza with allover application of handcrafted white & black silk jacquard rosebuds, plus inclusion against this thick floral backdrop of feather-tipped black silk organza stalks. Slim body-hugging sleeveless high-neck tube dress, knee length. In silk organza with allover horizontal application of passementerie. This ribbon trim is sewn on with no interruptions, so to allow for the mid-back zip closure it simply switches direction and keeps on going.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/604.working_process: Two allover applications: one of small handcrafted silk flowers; the other of passementerie, soutache style, sewn on horizontally non-stop (no cuts)
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/604.exhibitions: “Ferré. Abito come accento che esce dal corpo”, area Bernardelli, Mantova, 2015
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/604.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/604.remark: While essentially slim of silhouette, this outfit features an exquisite opulence deriving from the recherché decorative elements – all the richer at waist and wrist level. The short little jacket comes across as a modern-day take on the ones that back in the days of the Second Empire (1852-1870) Charles Worth combined with crinoline style skirts (so giving origin to the contemporary woman’s suit).
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/604.materials: White&black bird’s-eye silk jacquard (Stucchi, Como; art. 5384/4001, var. 000/4001), silk cady (Taroni, Como; art. 16691), silk velvet (Redaelli; art. Ivonne super)
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/604.description: Jacket in white&black micro bird’s-eye silk cady. Short long-sleeve spencer cut. Lavish ripple/spiral salt&pepper silk ribbon embroidery in both flat and twofold appliqué form. Rosebuds in the same basic silk cady all along bottom hem and at wide lower edge of sleeves (diminishing upward here). Dress in black silk velvet. Short, sleeveless, low-cut rectangular neckline. Amphora shape. At midriff, black cady band with horizontal 1 cm parallel topstitching. Gentle gathering at waist.
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/604.working_process: Soutage & cornely style embroidery of narrow passementerie ribbon; application of small handmade silk flowers
ALTA-MODA/FW1988-89/technical_sheets/604.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/advertising/bw_prints/6.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/advertising/bw_prints/6.remark: Here the defining factor is the dynamic quality of forms, as if blown by a sudden gust of wind: the skirt hugs the body in back, mimics a ripple effect in front. The sense of opulence comes from a simple intuition: namely, doubling up the panels and playing with pleats to give volume to a flat geometric shape.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/advertising/bw_prints/6.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/advertising/bw_prints/6.description: Jacket in dark blue wool satin. An (upper) hip-skimming funnel shape. Lavish lapel collar with single-button closure at waist, kimono style sleeve snug in the wrist. Skirt in heavy silk herringbone-weave jacquard with regular black&white striping. Slim tubular line, knee length. A balloon effect thanks to two deeply pleated and folded back panels sewn onto the skirt at waistband level. Bustier in dark blue wool satin. Vertical strapless cut, waist length.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/advertising/bw_prints/6.exhibitions: “Ferré. Abito come accento che esce dal corpo”, area Bernardelli, Mantova, 2015
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/advertising/bw_prints/6.materials: Wool satin (Sisan, Milano; art. 12605 col. blue); b&w stripe silk jacquard (Sisan, Milano; art. 4382)

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.remark: The traditionally simple notion of shirtwaist takes on a charmingly fresh flair thanks to the clever use of bias cuts and flat pleats to give the dress a swingy feel. Another interesting feature is the opposition between polkadot prints: irregular on a cyan & navy blue base for the crepe de chine; small (1 cm dia) and random on a navy blue base, complete with white horizontal 8 cm parallel striping, for the silk mousseline.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.description: Dress in crepe de chine, mannish shirtwaist style with buttoning down front and small fabric-covered buttons. Padded shoulders, shirt type cuffs. Fluid line with vertical cuts to knee, from there wedge-shaped inserts on the bias. Silk mousseline doubling with flat pleats on bottom part, at same level as exterior bias-cut inserts. Skirt in dark blue silk satin. Pencil cut, knee length.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.materials: Crepe de chine (Distel, Paris; art. 44/154, des. 5185, 100% silk), silk print mousseline (Stucchi, Como; art. 5126, des. 40546, 100% silk)

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.remark: This creation highlights the designer’s unique ability to fashion clothes as if pieces of sculpture. The trick is in the apparently simple sartorial solutions – bordering on the origami technique and as such in the finest Ferré tradition.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.description: Dress in dark blue wool, knee length. Two-tier construction: a slim tube style on the bottom, a sleeveless halter style on top. Adding to the beauty of the bodice part is a high collar open in front down to waist. It folds back to form a strapless bustier with three-button fastening midway. A similar folding process marks the otherwise open-back dress.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.materials: Wool poplin (Agnona, Biella; art. 32480/1; col. blue 02509, 100% wool)

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.remark: Here the defining factor is the dynamic quality of forms, as if blown by a sudden gust of wind: the skirt hugs the body in back, mimics a ripple effect in front. The sense of opulence comes from a simple intuition: namely, doubling up the panels and playing with pleats to give volume to a flat geometric shape.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.description: Jacket in dark blue wool satin. An (upper) hip-skimming funnel shape. Lavish lapel collar with single-button closure at waist, kimono style sleeve snug in the wrist. Skirt in heavy silk herringbone-weave jacquard with regular black&white striping. Slim tubular line, knee length. A balloon effect thanks to two deeply pleated and folded back panels sewn onto the skirt at waistband level. Bustier in dark blue wool satin. Vertical strapless cut, waist length.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.exhibitions: “Ferré. Abito come accento che esce dal corpo”, area Bernardelli, Mantova, 2015
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.materials: Wool satin (Sisan, Milano; art. 12605 col. blue); b&w stripe silk jacquard (Sisan, Milano; art. 4382)

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.remark: The “capote de paseo” – cape the torero uses during a bullfight – is the source of inspiration for this outfit, where telling the lead story is the contrast between the severity elegance of the dress and the slinky opulence of the cape.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.description: Bustier dress faux two-piece style: strapless white cotton piqué bodice low cut in back; slim crepe de chine skirt with pink crystal beading. Black silk 8 cm wide belt with matching vertical rectangular buckle. Cape in pink silk gazaar. In large oval shape folded in two asymmetrically lengthwise so that the different size ruffles drape naturally.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.materials: Cotton piqué knit, crêpe de chine, silk gazaar (Clerici Tessuto, Como; art. 1657), crystal beads

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.remark: An apparently simple crewneck dress finds new definition thanks to the trumpet skirt effect. It’s a master stroke. Adding to the upbeat appeal and the swingy feel are the bias cuts, the sunburst pleats, the playful prints and the small multicolor sequins.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.description: Dress in multicolor confetti print silk chiffon (fuchsia, red, yellow, turquoise, green, royal blue, white). Ankle-length siren style with round neck, straight padded shoulders and slim elbow sleeves. Soft chromatic degradé effect along hem. Two-part construction: an outer layer with vertical parallel cuts from shoulder to knee, from there wedge-shaped inserts on the bias; an inner layer with sunburst pleats peeking out from two slits at mid front and mid back, respectively.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.materials: Confetti print silk chiffon (Stucchi, Como; art. 5113, des. 40549, var. 001, 100% silk), silk chiffon in polkadot print (Sisan, Milano; art. 68 G/G, des. 1049, 100% silk), sequins

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.remark: Here the impression is of a sinuous female body blossoming from a bustier and an elementary skirt. The corolla effect of the bodice derives from a masterly manipulation of geometric figures (cones and truncated cones). The dress also has the feel of a column with capital.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.description: Dress with white silk gazaar bodice, long straight black silk cady skirt. Yellow silk ribbon belt with decorative topstitching. The bodice consists of a strapless bustier with two mostly overlapping stand-up truncated cone elements set at waist. Other circular pieces are folded over and inserted in back to create a corolla or ruffle effect
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.exhibitions: “1951-2001. Made in Italy Memoria”, Palazzo della Triennale, Milano, 2001
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.materials: Silk gazaar (Taroni, Como; art. 2829, col. white, 100% silk), silk cady (Stucchi, Como; art. 5115, 100% silk)

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.remark: The volume of the long skirt captures both a once-upon-a-time majestic feel and an unknown airy lightness. Again, it’s all about the artistry of the construction process, in memory of Marcel Boucher and his enchanting creations.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.description: Long skirt in white cotton piqué with navy blue striping. Creating the voluminous effect are two fully overlapping pieces of cloth – one the piqué, the other a plain silk organza – softly gathered at the waist. Open at mid front, all the way down to hem. Short skirt in black wool/silk satin. Slim line, knee length. T-shirt in wool/silk with navy blue glass tube beading. Slim fit, ultra low-cut V neck, elbow-length sleeves. While the alignment of the tube beads is mostly vertical, along the neckline and the lower edge of sleeves it is horizontal, so forming a border. Belt in white piqué with rectangular chrome buckle.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.materials: White cotton piqué with navy blue striping (Sisan, Milano; art. 803, des. 1036), silk organza, wool/silk satin (Taroni, art. 17055, col. black)

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.remark: The volume of the long skirt captures both a once-upon-a-time majestic feel and an unknown airy lightness. Here too it’s all about the artistry of the construction process, in memory of Marcel Boucher and his enchanting creations.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.description: Long skirt in white cotton piqué with dark blue 4 cm wide stripes (20 cm spacing). In reality, forming this skirt are two fully overlapping pieces of cloth – one the piqué, the other a plain silk organza – softly gathered at the waist. Open at mid front, all the way down to hem. Short skirt in dark blue wool/silk. Slim line, knee length. Top in dark blue wool/silk with black glass tube beading. Slim fit, round neck. Totally open back with crisscrossing ribbon straps. Belt in white piqué with rectangular chrome buckle.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.materials: Cotton piqué in horizontal stripe print (Sisan, Milano; art. 803, des. 1055), wool/silk satin (Taroni, Como; art. 17055, col. blue), silk organza, glass tube beads

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.remark: The volume of the long skirt captures both a once-upon-a-time majestic feel and an unknown airy lightness. Here too it’s all about the artistry of the construction process, in memory of Marcel Boucher and his enchanting creations.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.description: Long skirt in silk jacquard with fine white/navy striping. Creating the voluminous effect are two fully overlapping pieces of cloth – one the silk jacquard, the other a plain tone silk gazar – softly gathered into six groups of pleats at the waist. Open at mid front, all the way down to hem. Short skirt in navy blue wool/silk. Slim line, knee length. Allover black (vertical) glass tube beading.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_drawings/4.materials: White/navy stripe herringbone-weave silk jacquard (Sisan, Milano; art. 4382, col. 10, 100% silk), wool/silk blend (Taroni, Como; art. 77055, col. blue), silk gazar (Taroni, Como; art. 2829, col. black, 100% silk), white cotton piqué

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/173.notes: peplum with floral detail and belt
strapless dress with large bow detail

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/192.materials: Wool satin (Sisan, Milano; art. 12605, 100% wool, col. navy blue), silk cady (Taroni, Como; art. 16691, 100% silk, col. white)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/192.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/192.remark: Various decorative elements soften the impact of this outfit’s simple and severe style. They include the long thick row of buttons, the long glove in soft kid leather, plus the silk organza roses knotted at wrist with a topstitched ribbon.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/192.description: Jacket in dark blue wool satin. Round neck, long slim hip-skimming style. Strong shoulders with radial arm construction and overlay slit cuff. Slanted double besom flap pockets. Thick front buttoning with mannish flair. From upper hip to bottom hem a delicate flaring with buttons & buttonholes solely ornamental. Skirt in dark blue wool satin. Pencil cut, knee length, center slit front & back. Shirt in a natural hue of white silk cady. Short sleeves, crossover front, hip-skimming length.

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/192.notes: Striped belt tied at the waist.
dress with floral detail at neck
strapless dress with black sequin accent

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/193.colors: white, black, pink, red, yellow, green, purple
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/193.materials: Silk cady (Taroni, Como; art. 16691), silk organza, silk gazar
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/193.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/193.remark: The contrast between sweet spring bouquet and slim spiral skirt is what captures the imagination here.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/193.description: Long skirt in white silk cady. Spiral construction where wide band of doubled up fabric crisscrosses under bust, hugs hips, then creates a wrap-around effect all the way down. Top in white silk cady with adhesive element. Band type cut offset by diapason at mid front neckline. Bolero in white silk cady. Basically a shell with funnel sleeves. Thick application randomly all over of silk gazar and organza flowers in various shapes, sizes and colors. Small bias-cut ruffles plus cloth leaves & stems heighten the big bouquet sensation. Topstitched black ribbon knotted into a half bow.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/193.working_process: Hand application of silk flowers all over

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/193.materials: White cotton piqué with navy blue striping (Sisan, Milano; art. 803, des. 1036), silk organza, wool/silk satin (Taroni, art. 17055, col. black)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/193.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/193.remark: The volume of the long skirt captures both a once-upon-a-time majestic feel and an unknown airy lightness. Again, it’s all about the artistry of the construction process, in memory of Marcel Boucher and his enchanting creations.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/193.description: Long skirt in white cotton piqué with navy blue striping. Creating the voluminous effect are two fully overlapping pieces of cloth – one the piqué, the other a plain silk organza – softly gathered at the waist. Open at mid front, all the way down to hem. Short skirt in black wool/silk satin. Slim line, knee length. T-shirt in wool/silk with navy blue glass tube beading. Slim fit, ultra low-cut V neck, elbow-length sleeves. While the alignment of the tube beads is mostly vertical, along the neckline and the lower edge of sleeves it is horizontal, so forming a border. Belt in white piqué with rectangular chrome buckle.

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/193.materials: Crepe de chine (Distel, Paris; art. 44/154, des. 5185, 100% silk), silk print mousseline (Stucchi, Como; art. 5126, des. 40546, 100% silk)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/193.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/193.remark: The traditionally simple notion of shirtwaist takes on a charmingly fresh flair thanks to the clever use of bias cuts and flat pleats to give the dress a swingy feel. Another interesting feature is the opposition between polkadot prints: irregular on a cyan & navy blue base for the crepe de chine; small (1 cm dia) and random on a navy blue base, complete with white horizontal 8 cm parallel striping, for the silk mousseline.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/193.description: Dress in crepe de chine, mannish shirtwaist style with buttoning down front and small fabric-covered buttons. Padded shoulders, shirt type cuffs. Fluid line with vertical cuts to knee, from there wedge-shaped inserts on the bias. Silk mousseline doubling with flat pleats on bottom part, at same level as exterior bias-cut inserts. Skirt in dark blue silk satin. Pencil cut, knee length.

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.materials: Wool satin (Sisan, Milano; art. 12605 col. blue); b&w stripe silk jacquard (Sisan, Milano; art. 4382)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.remark: Here the defining factor is the dynamic quality of forms, as if blown by a sudden gust of wind: the skirt hugs the body in back, mimics a ripple effect in front. The sense of opulence comes from a simple intuition: namely, doubling up the panels and playing with pleats to give volume to a flat geometric shape.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.description: Jacket in dark blue wool satin. An (upper) hip-skimming funnel shape. Lavish lapel collar with single-button closure at waist, kimono style sleeve snug in the wrist. Skirt in heavy silk herringbone-weave jacquard with regular black&white striping. Slim tubular line, knee length. A balloon effect thanks to two deeply pleated and folded back panels sewn onto the skirt at waistband level. Bustier in dark blue wool satin. Vertical strapless cut, waist length.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.exhibitions: “Ferré. Abito come accento che esce dal corpo”, area Bernardelli, Mantova, 2015

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.materials: Cotton piqué knit, crêpe de chine, silk gazaar (Clerici Tessuto, Como; art. 1657), crystal beads
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.remark: The “capote de paseo” – cape the torero uses during a bullfight – is the source of inspiration for this outfit, where telling the lead story is the contrast between the severity elegance of the dress and the slinky opulence of the cape.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.description: Bustier dress faux two-piece style: strapless white cotton piqué bodice low cut in back; slim crepe de chine skirt with lilac crystal beading. Black silk 8 cm wide belt with matching vertical rectangular buckle. Cape in lilac silk gazaar. In large oval shape folded in two asymmetrically lengthwise so that the different size ruffles drape naturally.

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.materials: Cotton piqué knit, crêpe de chine, silk gazaar (Clerici Tessuto, Como; art. 1657), crystal beads
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.remark: The “capote de paseo” – cape the torero uses during a bullfight – is the source of inspiration for this outfit, where telling the lead story is the contrast between the severity elegance of the dress and the slinky opulence of the cape.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.description: Bustier dress faux two-piece style: strapless white cotton piqué bodice low cut in back; slim crepe de chine skirt with pink crystal beading. Black silk 8 cm wide belt with matching vertical rectangular buckle. Cape in pink silk gazaar. In large oval shape folded in two asymmetrically lengthwise so that the different size ruffles drape naturally.

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.notes: strapless top with oversized decorative belt

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.materials: Confetti print silk chiffon (Stucchi, Como; art. 5113, des. 40549, var. 001, 100% silk), silk chiffon in polkadot print (Sisan, Milano; art. 68 G/G, des. 1049, 100% silk), sequins
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.remark: An apparently simple crewneck dress finds new definition thanks to the trumpet skirt effect. It’s a master stroke. Adding to the upbeat appeal and the swingy feel are the bias cuts, the sunburst pleats, the playful prints and the small multicolor sequins.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.description: Dress in multicolor confetti print silk chiffon (fuchsia, red, yellow, turquoise, green, royal blue, white). Ankle-length siren style with round neck, straight padded shoulders and slim elbow sleeves. Soft chromatic degradé effect along hem. Two-part construction: an outer layer with vertical parallel cuts from shoulder to knee, from there wedge-shaped inserts on the bias; an inner layer with sunburst pleats peeking out from two slits at mid front and mid back, respectively.

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.materials: Silk gazaar (Taroni, Como; art. 2829, col. white, 100% silk), silk cady (Stucchi, Como; art. 5115, 100% silk)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.remark: Here the impression is of a sinuous female body blossoming from a bustier and an elementary skirt. The corolla effect of the bodice derives from a masterly manipulation of geometric figures (cones and truncated cones). The dress also has the feel of a column with capital.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.description: Dress with white silk gazaar bodice, long straight black silk cady skirt. Yellow silk ribbon belt with decorative topstitching. The bodice consists of a strapless bustier with two mostly overlapping stand-up truncated cone elements set at waist. Other circular pieces are folded over and inserted in back to create a corolla or ruffle effect
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.exhibitions: “1951-2001. Made in Italy Memoria”, Palazzo della Triennale, Milano, 2001

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.materials: Silk cady (Taroni, Como; art. 16691), silk organza, silk gazar
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.remark: The contrast between sweet spring bouquet and slim spiral skirt is what captures the imagination here.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.description: Long skirt in white silk cady. Spiral construction where wide band of doubled up fabric crisscrosses under bust, hugs hips, then creates a wrap-around effect all the way down. Top in white silk cady with adhesive element. Band type cut offset by diapason at mid front neckline. Bolero in white silk cady. Basically a shell with funnel sleeves. Thick application randomly all over of silk gazar and organza flowers in various shapes, sizes and colors. Small bias-cut ruffles plus cloth leaves & stems heighten the big bouquet sensation. Topstitched black ribbon knotted into a half bow.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.working_process: Hand application of silk flowers all over

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.materials: Cotton piqué in horizontal stripe print (Sisan, Milano; art. 803, des. 1055), wool/silk satin (Taroni, Como; art. 17055, col. blue), silk organza, glass tube beads
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.remark: The volume of the long skirt captures both a once-upon-a-time majestic feel and an unknown airy lightness. Here too it’s all about the artistry of the construction process, in memory of Marcel Boucher and his enchanting creations.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/194.description: Long skirt in white cotton piqué with dark blue 4 cm wide stripes (20 cm spacing). In reality, forming this skirt are two fully overlapping pieces of cloth – one the piqué, the other a plain silk organza – softly gathered at the waist. Open at mid front, all the way down to hem. Short skirt in dark blue wool/silk. Slim line, knee length. Top in dark blue wool/silk with black glass tube beading. Slim fit, round neck. Totally open back with crisscrossing ribbon straps. Belt in white piqué with rectangular chrome buckle.

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/203.materials: Wool poplin (Agnona, Biella; art. 32480/1; col. blue 02509, 100% wool)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/203.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/203.remark: This creation highlights the designer’s unique ability to fashion clothes as if pieces of sculpture. The trick is in the apparently simple sartorial solutions – bordering on the origami technique and as such in the finest Ferré tradition.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/203.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/203.description: Dress in dark blue wool, knee length. Two-tier construction: a slim tube style on the bottom, a sleeveless halter style on top. Adding to the beauty of the bodice part is a high collar open in front down to waist. It folds back to form a strapless bustier with three-button fastening midway. A similar folding process marks the otherwise open-back dress.

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/203.materials: Wool poplin (Agnona, Biella; art. 32480/1; col. blue 02509, 100% wool)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/203.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/203.remark: This creation highlights the designer’s unique ability to fashion clothes as if pieces of sculpture. The trick is in the apparently simple sartorial solutions – bordering on the origami technique and as such in the finest Ferré tradition.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/203.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/203.description: Dress in dark blue wool, knee length. Two-tier construction: a slim tube style on the bottom, a sleeveless halter style on top. Adding to the beauty of the bodice part is a high collar open in front down to waist. It folds back to form a strapless bustier with three-button fastening midway. A similar folding process marks the otherwise open-back dress.

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/203.notes: back view, strapless dress with buttons
strapless dress with a sash and buckle
back detail with white buttons and a white stripe
Wide white collar and lapel flower.

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/545.materials: Wool satin (Sisan, Milano; art. 12605, 100% wool, col. navy blue), silk cady (Taroni, Como; art. 16691, 100% silk, col. white)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/545.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/545.remark: Various decorative elements soften the impact of this outfit’s simple and severe style. They include the long thick row of buttons, the long glove in soft kid leather, plus the silk organza roses knotted at wrist with a topstitched ribbon.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/545.description: Jacket in dark blue wool satin. Round neck, long slim hip-skimming style. Strong shoulders with radial arm construction and overlay slit cuff. Slanted double besom flap pockets. Thick front buttoning with mannish flair. From upper hip to bottom hem a delicate flaring with buttons & buttonholes solely ornamental. Skirt in dark blue wool satin. Pencil cut, knee length, center slit front & back. Shirt in a natural hue of white silk cady. Short sleeves, crossover front, hip-skimming length.

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/546.colors: white, black, yellow, pink, purple, green
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/546.materials: Silk cady (Taroni, Como; art. 16691), silk organza, silk gazar

Band type cut offset by diapason at mid front neckline. Bolero in white silk cady. Basically a shell with funnel sleeves. Thick application randomly all over of silk gazar and organza flowers in various shapes, sizes and colors. Small bias-cut ruffles plus cloth leaves & stems heighten the big bouquet sensation. ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/546.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/546.remark: The volume of the long skirt captures both a once-upon-a-time majestic feel and an unknown airy lightness. Here too it’s all about the artistry of the construction process, in memory of Marcel Boucher and his enchanting creations.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/546.description: Long skirt in silk jacquard with fine white/navy striping. Creating the voluminous effect are two fully overlapping pieces of cloth – one the silk jacquard, the other a plain tone silk gazar – softly gathered into six groups of pleats at the waist. Open at mid front, all the way down to hem. Short skirt in navy blue wool/silk. Slim line, knee length. Allover black (vertical) glass tube beading.

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/621.materials: Wool satin (Sisan, Milano; art. 12605, 100% wool, col. navy blue), silk cady (Taroni, Como; art. 16691, 100% silk, col. white)

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/622.description: Bustier dress faux two-piece style: strapless white cotton piqué bodice low cut in back; slim crepe de chine skirt with lilac crystal beading. Black silk 8 cm wide belt with matching vertical rectangular buckle. Cape in lilac silk gazaar. In large oval shape folded in two asymmetrically lengthwise so that the different size ruffles drape naturally.

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/622.notes: dress with large yellow flower embellishment and sculptural yellow coat

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/622.materials: Cotton piqué knit, crêpe de chine, silk gazaar (Clerici Tessuto, Como; art. 1657), crystal beads
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/622.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

Black silk 8 cm wide belt with matching vertical rectangular buckle. Cape in pink silk gazaar. In large oval shape folded in two asymmetrically lengthwise so that the different size ruffles drape naturally.

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/622.materials: satin

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/622.colors: white, grey, black, purple, gold, green

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/622.materials: Silk cady (Taroni, Como; art. 16691), silk organza, silk gazar
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/622.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/622.remark: The contrast between sweet spring bouquet and slim spiral skirt is what captures the imagination here.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/622.description: Long skirt in white silk cady. Spiral construction where wide band of doubled up fabric crisscrosses under bust, hugs hips, then creates a wrap-around effect all the way down. Top in white silk cady with adhesive element. Band type cut offset by diapason at mid front neckline. Bolero in white silk cady. Basically a shell with funnel sleeves. Thick application randomly all over of silk gazar and organza flowers in various shapes, sizes and colors. Small bias-cut ruffles plus cloth leaves & stems heighten the big bouquet sensation. Topstitched black ribbon knotted into a half bow.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/622.working_process: Hand application of silk flowers all over

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/622.materials: chiffon
chiffon, feather

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/622.colors: multicolored, teal, red, yellow, pink, black
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/622.materials: sequin
Confetti print silk chiffon (Stucchi, Como; art. 5113, des. 40549, var. 001, 100% silk), silk chiffon in polkadot print (Sisan, Milano; art. 68 G/G, des. 1049, 100% silk), sequins
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/622.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/622.remark: An apparently simple crewneck dress finds new definition thanks to the trumpet skirt effect. It’s a master stroke. Adding to the upbeat appeal and the swingy feel are the bias cuts, the sunburst pleats, the playful prints and the small multicolor sequins.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/622.description: Dress in multicolor confetti print silk chiffon (fuchsia, red, yellow, turquoise, green, royal blue, white). Ankle-length siren style with round neck, straight padded shoulders and slim elbow sleeves. Soft chromatic degradé effect along hem. Two-part construction: an outer layer with vertical parallel cuts from shoulder to knee, from there wedge-shaped inserts on the bias; an inner layer with sunburst pleats peeking out from two slits at mid front and mid back, respectively.

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/622.colors: blue, pink, yellow, red, green, black

White/navy stripe herringbone-weave silk jacquard (Sisan, Milano; art. 4382, col. 10, 100% silk), wool/silk blend (Taroni, Como; art. 77055, col. blue), silk gazar (Taroni, Como; art. 2829, col. black, 100% silk), white cotton piqué
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/622.notes: dress with a large floral applique
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/622.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/622.remark: The volume of the long skirt captures both a once-upon-a-time majestic feel and an unknown airy lightness. Here too it’s all about the artistry of the construction process, in memory of Marcel Boucher and his enchanting creations.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/fashion_show_photos/622.description: Long skirt in silk jacquard with fine white/navy striping. Creating the voluminous effect are two fully overlapping pieces of cloth – one the silk jacquard, the other a plain tone silk gazar – softly gathered into six groups of pleats at the waist. Open at mid front, all the way down to hem. Short skirt in navy blue wool/silk. Slim line, knee length. Allover black (vertical) glass tube beading.

In reality, forming this skirt are two fully overlapping pieces of cloth – one the piqué, the other a plain silk organza – softly gathered at the waist. Open at mid front, all the way down to hem. Short skirt in dark blue wool/silk. Slim line, knee length. Top in dark blue wool/silk with black glass tube beading. Slim fit, round neck. Totally open back with crisscrossing ribbon straps. Belt in white piqué with rectangular chrome buckle.

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.remark: Various decorative elements soften the impact of this outfit’s simple and severe style. They include the long thick row of buttons, the long glove in soft kid leather, plus the silk organza roses knotted at wrist with a topstitched ribbon.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.description: Jacket in dark blue wool satin. Round neck, long slim hip-skimming style. Strong shoulders with radial arm construction and overlay slit cuff. Slanted double besom flap pockets. Thick front buttoning with mannish flair. From upper hip to bottom hem a delicate flaring with buttons & buttonholes solely ornamental. Skirt in dark blue wool satin. Pencil cut, knee length, center slit front & back. Shirt in a natural hue of white silk cady. Short sleeves, crossover front, hip-skimming length.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.materials: Wool satin (Sisan, Milano; art. 12605, 100% wool, col. navy blue), silk cady (Taroni, Como; art. 16691, 100% silk, col. white)

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.remark: Here the impression is of a sinuous female body blossoming from a bustier and an elementary skirt. The corolla effect of the bodice derives from a masterly manipulation of geometric figures (cones and truncated cones). The dress also has the feel of a column with capital.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.description: Dress with white silk gazaar bodice, long straight black silk cady skirt. Yellow silk ribbon belt with decorative topstitching. The bodice consists of a strapless bustier with two mostly overlapping stand-up truncated cone elements set at waist. Other circular pieces are folded over and inserted in back to create a corolla or ruffle effect
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.exhibitions: “1951-2001. Made in Italy Memoria”, Palazzo della Triennale, Milano, 2001
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.materials: Silk gazaar (Taroni, Como; art. 2829, col. white, 100% silk), silk cady (Stucchi, Como; art. 5115, 100% silk)

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.materials: Confetti print silk chiffon (Stucchi, Como; art. 5113, des. 40549, var. 001, 100% silk), silk chiffon in polkadot print (Sisan, Milano; art. 68 G/G, des. 1049, 100% silk), sequins

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.remark: This creation highlights the designer’s unique ability to fashion clothes as if pieces of sculpture. The trick is in the apparently simple sartorial solutions – bordering on the origami technique and as such in the finest Ferré tradition.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.description: Dress in dark blue wool, knee length. Two-tier construction: a slim tube style on the bottom, a sleeveless halter style on top. Adding to the beauty of the bodice part is a high collar open in front down to waist. It folds back to form a strapless bustier with three-button fastening midway. A similar folding process marks the otherwise open-back dress.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.materials: Wool poplin (Agnona, Biella; art. 32480/1; col. blue 02509, 100% wool)

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.remark: The traditionally simple notion of shirtwaist takes on a charmingly fresh flair thanks to the clever use of bias cuts and flat pleats to give the dress a swingy feel. Another interesting feature is the opposition between polkadot prints: irregular on a cyan & navy blue base for the crepe de chine; small (1 cm dia) and random on a navy blue base, complete with white horizontal 8 cm parallel striping, for the silk mousseline.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.description: Dress in crepe de chine, mannish shirtwaist style with buttoning down front and small fabric-covered buttons. Padded shoulders, shirt type cuffs. Fluid line with vertical cuts to knee, from there wedge-shaped inserts on the bias. Silk mousseline doubling with flat pleats on bottom part, at same level as exterior bias-cut inserts. Skirt in dark blue silk satin. Pencil cut, knee length.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.materials: Crepe de chine (Distel, Paris; art. 44/154, des. 5185, 100% silk), silk print mousseline (Stucchi, Como; art. 5126, des. 40546, 100% silk)

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.remark: The volume of the long skirt captures both a once-upon-a-time majestic feel and an unknown airy lightness. Again, it’s all about the artistry of the construction process, in memory of Marcel Boucher and his enchanting creations.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.description: Long skirt in white cotton piqué with navy blue striping. Creating the voluminous effect are two fully overlapping pieces of cloth – one the piqué, the other a plain silk organza – softly gathered at the waist. Open at mid front, all the way down to hem. Short skirt in black wool/silk satin. Slim line, knee length. T-shirt in wool/silk with navy blue glass tube beading. Slim fit, ultra low-cut V neck, elbow-length sleeves. While the alignment of the tube beads is mostly vertical, along the neckline and the lower edge of sleeves it is horizontal, so forming a border. Belt in white piqué with rectangular chrome buckle.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.materials: White cotton piqué with navy blue striping (Sisan, Milano; art. 803, des. 1036), silk organza, wool/silk satin (Taroni, art. 17055, col. black)

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.remark: Here the defining factor is the dynamic quality of forms, as if blown by a sudden gust of wind: the skirt hugs the body in back, mimics a ripple effect in front. The sense of opulence comes from a simple intuition: namely, doubling up the panels and playing with pleats to give volume to a flat geometric shape.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.description: Jacket in dark blue wool satin. An (upper) hip-skimming funnel shape. Lavish lapel collar with single-button closure at waist, kimono style sleeve snug in the wrist. Skirt in heavy silk herringbone-weave jacquard with regular black&white striping. Slim tubular line, knee length. A balloon effect thanks to two deeply pleated and folded back panels sewn onto the skirt at waistband level. Bustier in dark blue wool satin. Vertical strapless cut, waist length.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.exhibitions: “Ferré. Abito come accento che esce dal corpo”, area Bernardelli, Mantova, 2015
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.materials: Wool satin (Sisan, Milano; art. 12605 col. blue); b&w stripe silk jacquard (Sisan, Milano; art. 4382)

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.remark: Here the defining factor is the dynamic quality of forms, as if blown by a sudden gust of wind: the skirt hugs the body in back, mimics a ripple effect in front. The sense of opulence comes from a simple intuition: namely, doubling up the panels and playing with pleats to give volume to a flat geometric shape.

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.remark: The “capote de paseo” – cape the torero uses during a bullfight – is the source of inspiration for this outfit, where telling the lead story is the contrast between the severity elegance of the dress and the slinky opulence of the cape.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.description: Bustier dress faux two-piece style: strapless white cotton piqué bodice low cut in back; slim crepe de chine skirt with pink crystal beading. Black silk 8 cm wide belt with matching vertical rectangular buckle. Cape in pink silk gazaar. In large oval shape folded in two asymmetrically lengthwise so that the different size ruffles drape naturally.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.materials: Cotton piqué knit, crêpe de chine, silk gazaar (Clerici Tessuto, Como; art. 1657), crystal beads

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_drawings/capi.remark: The “capote de paseo” – cape the torero uses during a bullfight – is the source of inspiration for this outfit, where telling the lead story is the contrast between the severity elegance of the dress and the slinky opulence of the cape.

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_sheets/63462..label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_sheets/63462..remark: Various decorative elements soften the impact of this outfit’s simple and severe style. They include the long thick row of buttons, the long glove in soft kid leather, plus the silk organza roses knotted at wrist with a topstitched ribbon.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_sheets/63462..description: Jacket in dark blue wool satin. Round neck, long slim hip-skimming style. Strong shoulders with radial arm construction and overlay slit cuff. Slanted double besom flap pockets. Thick front buttoning with mannish flair. From upper hip to bottom hem a delicate flaring with buttons & buttonholes solely ornamental. Skirt in dark blue wool satin. Pencil cut, knee length, center slit front & back. Shirt in a natural hue of white silk cady. Short sleeves, crossover front, hip-skimming length.
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_sheets/63462..materials: Wool satin (Sisan, Milano; art. 12605, 100% wool, col. navy blue), silk cady (Taroni, Como; art. 16691, 100% silk, col. white)

ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_sheets/63498..label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
ALTA-MODA/SS1987/technical_sheets/63498..remark: The traditionally simple notion of shirtwaist takes on a charmingly fresh flair thanks to the clever use of bias cuts and flat pleats to give the dress a swingy feel. Another interesting feature is the opposition between polkadot prints: irregular on a cyan & navy blue base for the crepe de chine; small (1 cm dia) and random on a navy blue base, complete with white horizontal 8 cm parallel striping, for the silk mousseline.

Skirt in dark blue silk satin. Pencil cut, knee length.
